    - `stoplessGoalStatus`
    - `stopMessageEnabled`
    - `stopMessageExcludeDirect`
    - `stopMessageClientInject`
    - `stopMessageState`
    - `serverToolLoopState`
  - 下一步可以继续审 `stopMessageClientInject` / `stopMessageState` / `serverToolLoopState` 是否还有可删 residue，但不应再把 `serverToolFollowupMode` 当作活字段。

# 2026-06-24 metadata center phase-1 当前剩余 residue 快速分型

- 经过本轮 source audit，以下字段当前都有直接活 consumer，不能再按 dead semantic 路径处理：
  - `serverToolFollowupSource`
    - Rust: `chat_servertool_orchestration.rs` / VR route metadata / outcome contract
    - TS: `servertool-followup-dispatch.ts` / snapshot writer
  - `stoplessGoalStatus`
    - TS: `provider-response-converter.ts` / `servertool-followup-dispatch.ts`
    - Rust/bridge: snapshot hooks / request-stage projection
  - `stopMessageClientInject`
    - TS: `provider-response-converter.ts` / `goal-state-persistence.ts`
    - sharedmodule: `servertool/state-scope.ts`
  - `stopMessageState`
    - TS: `provider-response-converter.ts`
    - Rust/sharedmodule: persisted lookup / stop-message-auto / contracts / tests
  - `serverToolLoopState`
    - TS: `provider-response-converter.ts` / nested followup gate
    - Rust/sharedmodule: `backend_route_contract.rs` / `loop_state_contract.rs` / persisted lookup / stopless contracts
- 当前判断：
  - phase 1 里“明显只有 center 镜像、无真实 consumer”的字段已经连续收掉：
    - `providerFamily`
    - `servertoolResponseOrchestration`
    - `serverToolFollowupMode`
  - 剩余字段大多已经进入真实 servertool / stopless / persisted-state 合同，不适合继续按 dead residue 方式物理删除。
  - 下一阶段更合理的方向，开始转向 Rust-side snapshot adapter feasibility / owner boundary 明确化，而不是继续机械扫同类 dead slot。

# 2026-06-24 metadata center Rust feasibility 审计：最小接入点已锁，完整 registry 仍不可直接进入

- 本轮目标：
  - 不实现 Rust center，只用当前代码证明：
    - 最小 snapshot adapter 接入点在哪里；
    - 首批应读哪些 family；
    - 现在为什么还不能直接上完整 Rust request-scoped registry。
- 已确认代码事实：
  - TS request-stage 当前就是 JS center 的集中 materialize 点：
    - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/pipeline/hub-pipeline-execute-request-stage.ts`
    - 这里先读 JS center，再把 `request_truth` / `continuation_context` / `runtime_control` 重新投成 `metadata` / `runtime_control` / `__rt` / 顶层 projection，然后调用 `runHubPipelineLibWithNative(...)`。
  - native 协议当前只有一个 `metadata: Record<string, unknown>` 载体：
    - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/native/router-hotpath/native-hub-pipeline-orchestration-semantics.ts`
    - 没有独立 Rust carrier / snapshot 参数。
  - Rust request-path 首批 reader 仍普遍按 `serde_json::Value` 直读字段：
    - `router-hotpath-napi/src/hub_pipeline_lib/engine.rs`
    - `router-hotpath-napi/src/hub_pipeline_blocks/router_metadata_input.rs`
    - `router-hotpath-napi/src/virtual_router_engine/routing/metadata.rs`
    - `router-hotpath-napi/src/chat_servertool_orchestration.rs`
  - clone / retry / nested followup 当前复制的是 JSON metadata + 绑定的 JS center，而不是 Rust request handle：
    - retry / attempt merge：`src/server/runtime/http-server/executor/request-executor-attempt-state.ts`
    - nested followup merge：`src/server/runtime/http-server/executor/servertool-followup-metadata.ts`
    - provider response sync-back：`src/server/runtime/http-server/executor/provider-response-converter.ts`
- feasibility 结论：
  - 最小可行接入点：
    - `executeRequestStagePipeline -> runHubPipelineLibWithNative(...)` 前加只读 snapshot adapter。
  - 最小可行范围：
    - 只读 family：`request_truth` / `continuation_context` / `runtime_control`
    - 只接 1 个最窄 Rust reader，优先 request-stage / route-stage 单点 reader
  - 当前仍不可直接进入完整 Rust registry：
    - 因为 native ingress 还没有稳定 request-scoped Rust carrier；
    - clone / followup 仍没有 Rust handle 透传链；
    - 直接落 registry 最可能长出第三真源：
      - JS center
      - payload residue
      - Rust registry
- 当前建议：
  - phase 1 到这里已经拿到足够硬的 feasibility blocker；
  - 下一步若继续 phase 2，应先做“只读 snapshot adapter + 单 reader”实验，而不是宣布 Rust/JS dual-write 已可开工。

# 2026-06-25 phase 2 协议草案：只读 snapshot adapter + 单 reader

- 已落盘到：
  - `docs/goals/metadata-center-rust-js-dualwrite-execution-plan.md`
- 这轮新增的可开工草案：
  - 给 `HubPipelineInput.request` 新增可选实验字段：
    - `metadataCenterSnapshot?: { request_truth?, continuation_context?, runtime_control? }`
  - 保持现有 `request.metadata` 不变，首批 spike 不移除 payload residue
  - snapshot 只能在：
    - `executeRequestStagePipeline(...)`
    - `runHubPipelineLibWithNative(...)` 调用前
    集中构造
- 首批 Rust reader 草案：
  - 文件：`router-hotpath-napi/src/hub_pipeline_blocks/router_metadata_input.rs`
  - 首批字段：`retryProviderKey`
  - 建议读取顺序：
    1. `metadataCenterSnapshot.runtime_control.retryProviderKey`
    2. `metadata.runtime_control.retryProviderKey`
    3. 明确禁止 `metadata.__rt.retryProviderKey`
- 首批白盒建议：
  - Rust:
    - prefers snapshot retry pin
    - falls back to runtime_control when snapshot absent
    - still ignores legacy `__rt`
  - TS:
    - request-stage 只在一个入口构造 snapshot
    - snapshot 内容只能来自三个 center family 读值
    - 不允许再从 flat metadata / `__rt` 反向补一份 snapshot

# 2026-06-25 phase 2 协议草案压缩版

- 最小实验输入：
  - 在 `HubPipelineInput.request` 上加可选 `metadataCenterSnapshot`
  - 只带 3 个 family：
    - `request_truth`
    - `continuation_context`
    - `runtime_control`
  - `metadata` 继续保留，不在 spike 首轮移除
- 最小 reader：
  - 先改 `router_metadata_input.rs`
  - 第一字段只迁 `retryProviderKey`
  - 读取顺序：
    1. snapshot.runtime_control.retryProviderKey
    2. metadata.runtime_control.retryProviderKey
    3. 明确不读 `metadata.__rt.retryProviderKey`
- spike 成功条件：
  - 不新增第二个共享写点
  - clone / retry / nested followup 不丢 snapshot
  - 单个 Rust reader 能删掉一小段 payload residue
  - 不需要 handler / bridge / servertool shell 补同步
- spike 失败条件：
  - 需要 caller 手工造第二份 snapshot
  - reader 迁完仍离不开原 payload residue
  - 需要 fallback 或多处同步补偿
- 原因：
  - `stopMessage*` 仍是 request/direct 判定窄面，适合作为 phase-2 下一刀
  - `serverToolFollowup*` 已经牵涉 servertool followup + route planning + classifier，更容易扩散，不能先动

# 2026-06-25 stopMessage reader 审计修正

- 本轮重新审计 `stopMessageEnabled` 的实际读取面，发现旧计划中写法与代码不符：
  1. `hub_pipeline_blocks/napi_bindings.rs` 的 `stop_message_excludes_direct(metadata)` 当前是死代码——没有调用方，TS wrapper `evaluateResponsesDirectRouteDecisionWithNative()` 也没有传 `metadata` 给 Rust。这个函数虽然读 `stopMessageEnabled`，但不是活 reader，不应被误写成"下一批 snapshot-first 切口"。
  2. 真正活着的 `stopMessageEnabled` 读取者是 `req_process_stage1_tool_governance_blocks/orchestrator.rs` 的 `should_inject_stopless_system_instruction(metadata)`，它读 `metadata.stopMessageEnabled` 和 `metadata.routecodexPortStopMessageEnabled`，决定是否注入 stopless system instruction + reasoningStop tool。这才是 phase-2 的第一个切口。
  3. `req_process_stage1_tool_governance_blocks/servertool_injection.rs` 的 `read_runtime_metadata(metadata)` 仍读整个 `metadata.__rt`（主要消费 `webSearch`），是 `__rt` residue 的另一个活入口，应排在 stop-message 判定之后。
- plan 文档 `docs/goals/metadata-center-rust-js-dualwrite-execution-plan.md` 已同步修正下一步 reader 顺序为三步：
  1. `orchestrator.rs` 的 `should_inject_stopless_system_instruction()`
  2. `servertool_injection.rs` 的 `read_runtime_metadata()`
  3. `chat_servertool_orchestration.rs` + VR metadata readers

# 2026-06-25 stopless OpenAI Chat reasoningStop terminal response audit

- Current line locked by Jason: OpenAI Chat provider response -> Chat inbound -> Chat process -> Responses outbound. servertool/stopless only belongs in Chat process.
- Function owner located: `HubPipelineEngine::execute` response path calls `govern_hub_resp_chatprocess_03_response(...)`, then `plan_resp_chatprocess_03_servertool_runtime_actions(...)`, then outbound projection.
- Existing coverage gap: tests lock that `finish_reason=tool_calls + reasoningStop` emits a stop runtime action, but do not lock terminal schema-pass current-turn normalization into normal stop + visible summary before Responses outbound.
- Expected red test: OpenAI Chat response with `reasoningStop(arguments stopreason=0 terminal schema)` entering `/v1/responses` relay must leave Chat process as normal stop response, no raw `reasoningStop`/tool_calls, and Responses outbound must not produce `output: []` / `EMPTY_ASSISTANT_RESPONSE`.

# 2026-06-25 stopless Anthropic/OpenAI inbound mapping correction

- Jason 指出 clone payload 违规后重新审计：`parse_anthropic_messages_response()` 本身返回 raw clone，但 `HubPipelineEngine::execute_response_path` 随后调用 `canonicalize_provider_response_for_client(...)`，在 `run_hub_resp_inbound_02_parsed_entrypoint(...)` 和 `govern_hub_resp_chatprocess_03_response(...)` 之前把 Anthropic provider response 转成 OpenAI Chat canonical。
- 因此真实 chat-process 输入没有直接吃 Anthropic raw payload；但 canonicalization 位于 engine inbound 后置步骤，名字和 parser clone 容易误导，后续应把 contract/gate 锁成：`HubRespInbound02Parsed` typed boundary 只能接 canonical OpenAI Chat for chat process。
- 已补同构测试：OpenAI Chat `tool_calls.reasoningStop` terminal schema 与 Anthropic `content[].tool_use(name=reasoningStop)` terminal schema 都必须投影为 normal Responses completed response，不得成为 required_action/empty output/raw internal tool。

# 2026-06-25 Anthropic response inbound canonicalization fixed

- 修正方向：Anthropic provider response 不允许以 raw clone 形态进入 chat process；`parse_anthropic_messages_response()` 现在直接调用 `build_openai_chat_response_from_anthropic_message(...)`，输出 `format=openai-chat` + `object=chat.completion`。
- 已删除 engine response path 的后置 `canonicalize_provider_response_for_client(...)` Anthropic 补偿，避免 Anthropic->Chat 映射同时存在于 parser 和 engine 两处。
- 锁定测试：`test_parse_anthropic_messages_response` 和 `test_parse_anthropic_reasoning_stop_tool_use_to_openai_chat_tool_calls` 断言 raw `stop_reason/content` 不穿过 inbound；OpenAI Chat 与 Anthropic reasoningStop terminal schema 两条 response tests 均通过。
- 当前语义：provider-specific raw shape 在 inbound parse 阶段归一；chat process 只处理 OpenAI Chat canonical；Responses outbound 只做 client projection。
# 2026-06-25 stopless live sample audit: localhost conflict + invalid_schema

- 本轮新增硬证据：
  - `~/.codex/config.toml` 里的 `model_providers.long.base_url` 仍是 `http://127.0.0.1:10000/v1`。
  - `netstat` 证实 `127.0.0.1:10000` 监听者是 `netdisk_service:3798`，不是 RouteCodex。
  - 同机 `*.10000` 还有 `node:38984` 监听，说明 `localhost` 与当前可达路由不是同一个真源。
- live sample 结论：
  - `req_1782368862849_62e959a3` 的 provider request 已注入 `reasoningStop` + stop guidance。
  - provider response 返回 `finish_reason=tool_calls`，并带有 `reasoningStop` 的完整 arguments。
  - Rust runtime 随后把这轮判成 `triggerHint=invalid_schema`，并给出 `missingFields=[has_evidence,evidence,issue_cause,excluded_factors,diagnostic_order]`。
  - 因此当前问题不是“没注入工具/没走 provider”，而是“schema 合同与当前拦截规则不一致，后续被判成 invalid_schema”。
- 另一个样本结论：
  - `req_1782366250321_4014d028` 的 provider response 也返回 `reasoningStop` tool call，字段是完整 JSON，但字段名仍沿用当前合同。
  - 这进一步说明样本不是纯 no_schema，而是“schema 口径/字段集合”与 runtime 判定口径不一致。
- 当前操作禁区：
  - 不把 LAN IP 当修复方案。
  - 不通过 broad kill / 未授权停止其他进程解决 127.0.0.1 冲突。
  - 不把 SSE 当 stopless 业务 owner。

# 2026-06-25 metadata center session/request isolation + lifecycle buffer

- Jason clarified concurrency requirement: multiple zterm/server sessions can run at once, so MetadataCenter cannot rely on a global "latest metadata" lookup. Reads/writes must be isolated by current request metadata object plus requestId/sessionId scope.
- Implemented current contract:
  - `writeMetadataCenterSlot(...)` and `readMetadataCenterSlot(...)` accept `expectedScope { requestId, sessionId }`.
  - If expected requestId/sessionId does not match the target/source MetadataCenter request truth, the API fail-fast with a scope mismatch error.
  - Live metadata remains request-local; session buffer is not a live read fallback.
- Lifecycle closeout:
  - `releaseMetadataCenterForHttpResponse(...)` marks slots released and records a bounded per-session released snapshot buffer.
  - Buffer capacity is 10 snapshots per session; overflow drops oldest released snapshots.
  - Buffer is audit/debug history only, not continuation truth and not runtime control fallback.
- Focused evidence:
  - `npm run jest:run -- --runInBand --runTestsByPath tests/server/runtime/http-server/metadata-center/metadata-center-dualwrite.spec.ts tests/servertool/stopless-metadata-center.spec.ts` PASS, 13 tests.
  - `npm run verify:metadata-center-dualwrite-api` PASS.
  - `npm run verify:architecture-metadata-center-manifest-code-sync` PASS.
  - `npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS.
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi metadata_center --lib -- --nocapture` PASS, 9 tests.

# 2026-06-25 SSE output_text delta spacing verification

- Symptom: streamed client text could lose spaces and concatenate words after recent schema stripping changes.
- Owner boundary: this is response outbound/SSE projection hygiene only; stopless schema judgment remains in chat process/servertool owner.
- Root cause confirmed in code: `strip_stop_schema_control_blocks` could trim ordinary text when invoked on SSE delta strings. Current fix returns the original text when no stop schema control signal is present.
- Regression lock:
  - `project_responses_sse_frame_for_client_preserves_output_text_delta_spacing` now covers both leading-space delta (`" leading space"`) and trailing-space delta (`"The quick "`).
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi project_responses_sse_frame_for_client_preserves_output_text_delta_spacing --lib -- --nocapture` PASS.
  - `cargo test -p servertool-core strips_ --lib -- --nocapture` PASS, 8 tests.
- Build/install/live evidence:
  - `npm run build:dev` PASS.

# 2026-06-25 stopless audit review cross-check

- Reviewed external stopless audit against repo SSOT: `function-map + verification-map + mainline-call-map + wiki + owner code`.
- Confirmed claims:
  - `STOP_MESSAGE_PERSISTED_LOOKUP_POLICY = "strict_session_only"` and stopless `persist_keys` are filtered through `is_stopless_persistent_key(session:)`.
  - `build_stop_message_auto_run_output(...)` still computes `used_for_prompt = repeatCount - 1`; standalone CLI path itself does not write back any state.
  - `build_stopless_cli_model_guidance(...)` still contains forbidden internal terms (`stop schema`, `stop result`, `stopreason`) but current output zeros `model_guidance`, so this is latent leakage only.
  - `is_persistent_sticky_key(...)` still accepts `tmux:` / `conversation:` while stopless-specific path uses `is_stopless_persistent_key(...)`.
- Important correction against the audit's proposed fix:
  - Current repo SSOT explicitly says stopless progression truth must come from runtime metadata + current request tool_output, and that `sessionDir` / persisted writeback are forbidden.
  - Evidence:
    - `docs/architecture/function-map.yml` note: `NoSchema stopless progression must advance ... not through file persistence`
    - `docs/architecture/verification-map.yml` note: validate active request-truth counting while `sessionDir` and persisted writeback remain absent
    - `docs/architecture/wiki/stopless-session-mainline-source.md`: stl-05 says request-turn restore occurs without file persistence
  - Therefore "add save_persisted_runtime_stop_message_state + CLI writeback" would conflict with current stopless owner contract unless SSOT is intentionally changed first.
- Additional correction:
  - `STOPLESS_FINALIZATION_MISSING` grep target string is not runtime-owner proof. Real current enforcement appears to be finalized-marker semantics in Rust `chat_node_result_semantics.rs`, while the cited SSE spec only asserts transport output does not emit that literal string.

# 2026-06-25 stopless metadata-center-only convergence

- Goal this slice: physically remove stopless persisted writeback/readback remnants and lock progression truth to `MetadataCenter.runtime_control.stopless` + current request tool_output only.
- Code changes in progress:
  - Rust `run_stop_message_auto_handler_json` no longer returns `persistKeys/stateUpdate`; now returns `stoplessRuntimeState` only.
  - TS stop-message handler now feeds `stoplessRuntimeState` into persist-plan calculation and writes runtime state only through MetadataCenter.
  - Deleted `servertool-core/src/persisted_state_fs.rs` and removed module export from `servertool-core/src/lib.rs`.
  - Docs updated to say stopless progression truth is MetadataCenter + current tool_output, not file persistence.
- Remaining verification task after edits: rerun focused Rust/Jest suites and grep remaining stopless-specific `persistKeys/stateUpdate` contract residue.

# 2026-06-26 responses-handler submit_tool_outputs metadata-center owner correction

- 本轮继续按 `metadata-center-request-scoped-closeout-plan` 收 request-path handler 侧的 MetadataCenter 写点。
- 先用 focused 红测锁定分歧：
  - `tests/server/handlers/responses-handler.submit-tool-outputs.responses-provider.spec.ts`
    - 旧断言要求：relay `resumeMeta.providerKey` 必须在 `handleResponses -> executePipeline` 边界前就进入 `MetadataCenter.runtime_control.retryProviderKey`
  - 但更贴近真实主线的 focused e2e 已经证明：
    - `tests/server/handlers/handler-request-executor.unified-semantics.e2e.spec.ts`
    - resumed relay provider pin 会在 `request executor before hub pipeline` 阶段成立
    - 这条证据面比 isolated handler spec 更接近真 runtime 主线
- 代码核对结论：
  - `src/modules/llmswitch/bridge/responses-request-bridge.ts::buildResponsesPipelineMetadataForHttp`
    - relay resume 只把 `responsesResume` 写入 continuation_context
    - 只把 `routeHint` 写入 runtime_control
    - 对 `providerKey` 明确保留 `continuationOwner !== 'relay'` 条件，说明 handler 边界当前并不是 relay retry pin owner
  - `src/server/runtime/http-server/executor/request-executor-attempt-state.ts`
    - 仍保留“不要从 relay `responsesResume.providerKey` 二次升级 retry pin”的防线
    - 因此如果强行把 handler 边界改成 relay retry pin owner，会让 isolated handler 语义和 attempt-state 旧 contract 发生新的 owner 冲突
- 本轮动作：
  - 评估后未保留对 `responses-request-bridge.ts` 的 runtime 改动；避免把 handler 入口长成第二个 relay retry pin owner
  - 改测试对齐真实边界：
    - `tests/server/handlers/responses-handler.submit-tool-outputs.responses-provider.spec.ts`
    - 现在只要求：
      1. relay `responsesResume` 留在 continuation_context
      2. relay `routeHint` 已进入 runtime_control
      3. `retryProviderKey` 在 handler 边界仍为 `undefined`
    - relay provider pin 的有效闭环继续由 request-executor focused e2e 证明
- 本轮验证证据：
  - `PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH node --experimental-vm-modules ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runInBand tests/server/handlers/responses-handler.submit-tool-outputs.responses-provider.spec.ts` PASS
  - `PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH node --experimental-vm-modules ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runInBand tests/server/handlers/handler-request-executor.unified-semantics.e2e.spec.ts -t "submit_tool_outputs|preserves resumed relay session scope and provider pin through request executor before hub pipeline|keeps ordinary /v1/responses payload untouched at handler boundary"` PASS
- 当前收口后的真相：
  - handler request 边界 owner：
    - relay resume -> continuation_context.responsesResume
    - relay route hint -> runtime_control.routeHint
  - request-executor 主线 owner：
    - “provider pin through request executor before hub pipeline” 仍由真实 request-path e2e 锁定
  - 因此本轮不宣称整个 relay retry pin owner 已最终定案，只宣称：
    - isolated handler spec 已改回当前真实边界
    - 当前 request-path 主线 focused evidence 保持绿

# 2026-06-26 runtime_control remaining owner audit: preselectedRoute / stopMessage* / providerProtocol

- 本轮继续按 goal 收 `runtime_control` 里还模糊的三个字段族：
  - `preselectedRoute`
  - `stopMessageEnabled` / `stopMessageExcludeDirect`
  - `providerProtocol`
- 代码真相重新核对后确认：
  1. `preselectedRoute`
     - 当前写 owner：
       - `src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts`
       - router-direct relay path 用 `writeMetadataCenterRuntimeControl('preselectedRoute', ...)`
     - 当前 release owner：
       - `src/server/runtime/http-server/executor-metadata.ts::decorateMetadataForAttempt`
       - retry attempt 时 `releaseRuntimeControl('preselectedRoute', ...)`
     - request-stage TS shell：
       - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/pipeline/hub-pipeline-execute-request-stage.ts`
       - 只 transport / materialize，不能成为 semantic owner
  2. `stopMessageEnabled` / `stopMessageExcludeDirect`
     - 当前 entry/runtime 写 owner：
       - `src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts`
       - 端口 stop-message enablement / direct exclusion
     - 当前 narrow request-capture exception：
       - `src/server/runtime/http-server/executor-metadata.ts`
       - 仅 `hasStoplessDirectiveInRequestPayload(...) -> stopMessageEnabled=true`
     - 顶层 `metadata.stopMessageEnabled` / `routecodexPortStopMessageEnabled` 仍有真实消费：
       - Rust req-process / stopless decision 仍会读这些 compatibility mirrors
       - 因此当前不能误删，也不能把顶层 mirror 误记成 owner 真源
  3. `providerProtocol`
     - 当前并未看到明确的 `writeRuntimeControl('providerProtocol', ...)` 活写点
     - 仓库真相仍以 top-level protocol-shell transport 为主：
       - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/pipeline/hub-pipeline.ts`
       - 多处 host/provider bridge 仍直接读 `metadata.providerProtocol`
     - 因此当前不能在文档里过度宣称 `runtime_control.providerProtocol` 已 fully anchored
- 本轮动作：
  - 不硬删上述 top-level projections；证据不支持
  - 只把真实 owner / transitional mirror 状态补进文档：
    - `docs/architecture/wiki/metadata-center-mainline-source.md`
    - `docs/architecture/function-map.yml`
    - `docs/architecture/verification-map.yml`
  - 新文档口径明确：
    - `preselectedRoute` = router-direct relay write + attempt retry release
    - `stopMessage*` 顶层字段 = compatibility projection，不是第二真源 owner
    - `providerProtocol` 仍处于 protocol-shell transport 过渡态，不能假装已完成 center-first 收口
- 本轮验证证据：
  - `npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS
  - `npm run verify:architecture-metadata-center-manifest-code-sync` PASS
  - `PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH node --experimental-vm-modules ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runInBand tests/sharedmodule/hub-pipeline-preselected-route.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/executor-metadata.spec.ts tests/server/http-server/request-executor-preselected-route.blackbox.spec.ts -t "preselectedRoute|stopMessageEnabled|routecodexPortStopMessageEnabled|providerProtocol"` PASS
- 这轮收敛结果：
  - 当前 `runtime_control` 的剩余模糊字段不再被文档写成“已经 fully anchored”
  - 而是被明确区分：
    - 真写点 owner
    - retry/release owner
    - transitional mirror / transport residue
  - 这使下一轮可以继续按 gate 推进物理删除或 Rust-only closeout，而不是在错误前提下删字段

# 2026-06-26 providerProtocol contract de-overclaim

- 本轮继续沿 `runtime_control` 模糊字段收口，单独下钻 `providerProtocol`。
- 代码真相核对结果：
  - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/pipeline/hub-pipeline.ts`
    - `readProviderProtocol(metadata)` 仍直接读 top-level `metadata.providerProtocol`
    - `buildMaterializedRequest(...)` / `materializeHubPipelineRequest(...)` 也继续把它作为 normalized request 的 protocol-shell transport 字段
  - `src/server/runtime/http-server/executor-pipeline.ts`
    - stage recorder protocol 来自 `resolveEntryProtocolFromEndpoint(...)`
    - 不是 MetadataCenter `runtime_control.providerProtocol` writer
  - 全仓未找到对应的活写点：
    - 没有 `writeRuntimeControl('providerProtocol', ...)`
  - 因此当前仓库真相不是“`providerProtocol` 已经 center-first”
    - 而是“仍以 top-level protocol transport / normalized request field 为主”
- 本轮动作：
  - 不改 runtime
  - 只收文档，避免 overclaim：
    - `docs/architecture/function-map.yml`
      - `server.responses_request_handler_bridge_surface` notes 明确：
        - 当前 bridge/request metadata 仍主要 transport top-level `providerProtocol`
        - 不能把它记成 `runtime_control.providerProtocol` owner
    - `docs/architecture/verification-map.yml`
      - request-bridge 验证口径明确：
        - 现阶段只能证明 top-level protocol-shell transport
        - 不能拿现有测试冒充 center-backed runtime_control owner 证据
- 本轮验证证据：
  - `npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS
  - `npm run verify:architecture-metadata-center-manifest-code-sync` PASS
- 当前收敛结果：
  - `providerProtocol` 不再被文档暗示成“已经属于 runtime_control 的已完成字段”
  - 后续如果要继续收它，必须先落真实 `writeRuntimeControl('providerProtocol', ...)` owner，再补 map/gate，而不是先写文档冒充完成

# 2026-06-26 stopless real-entry outbound context regression slice 12

- `tests/sharedmodule/hub-pipeline-rust-responses-provider-payload.regression.spec.ts`
  的 real-entry 用例失败后，白盒诊断确认：
  - `ReqProcessToolGovernance` 已执行；
  - `metadata.runtime_control.stopMessageEnabled=true` 仍在；
  - 但 `ReqOutboundContextMerge` 使用的是 `ReqInboundContextCapture` 时抓到的旧
    `responsesContext/contextSnapshot`，其中只有原始 user turn；
  - 结果：req_chatprocess 注入后的 stopless `instructions/systemInstruction`
    没有进入 outbound rebuild，最终 anthropic provider payload 丢失 stop schema 合同。
- 根因不是 metadata center 丢失，也不是 stopless 注入没跑；根因是
  `hub_pipeline_lib/engine.rs` 在 outbound 仍复用 inbound 旧 snapshot。
- 修复方向：outbound attach 的 responses context 必须基于
  `governed.processed_request` 重抓当前 turn canonical snapshot，而不是贴回 inbound snapshot。
# 2026-06-26 chat usage normalization closeout
- Symptom: chat SSE / direct relay usage split across request-executor, converter, SSE handler, and outbound logger.
- Hypothesis: single helper should normalize provider raw/chat SSE usage once, then outbound should only project from usageLogInfo.
- Next: add red test for OpenAI chat SSE frame with usage, wire normalize helper, remove SSE handler usage parsing.

# 2026-06-26 5555 stream disconnect read-only audit
- User symptom:
  - Codex TUI on port `5555` still shows `Stream disconnected before completion: Upstream request failed`.
- Sample evidence:
  - Latest first-round sample:
    - `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-responses/ports/5555/req_1782443696584_f10410c9/`
  - Latest continuation sample right after tool-required response:
    - `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-responses/ports/5555/req_1782443703580_d5803128/`
  - First-round `provider-response.json` proves upstream returned healthy SSE with:
    - `response.completed`
    - `response.done`
    - `status="requires_action"`
    - `required_action.submit_tool_outputs`
    - `usage={input_tokens:516,output_tokens:166,total_tokens:682}`
  - Same first-round `client-response.json` also contains the completed SSE payload, so first round is not upstream-failed and not provider stream break.
- Runtime/log conclusion:
  - Failure surface is continuation / submit-tool-outputs path after first-round tool request, not the initial `/v1/responses` provider stream.
  - Historic exact server failure already exists in canonical `~/.rcc/logs/server-5555.log`:
    - `Error [ERR_STREAM_WRITE_AFTER_END]: write after end`
    - followed by `response.sse.client_close ... closeBeforeStreamEnd=true`
    - triggered during `/v1/responses.submit_tool_outputs`
  - This matches user-visible "stream disconnected before completion" far better than provider/network failure.
- Owner direction locked from map/docs:
  - `handler-response-sse.ts` is transport-only; docs explicitly forbid treating SSE layer as continuation / tool-governance owner.
  - Real owner direction is `responses.continuation.mainline` + response/request lifecycle around `submit_tool_outputs`, with SSE only as symptom surface.
- Read-only conclusion:
  - Current strongest root-cause candidate is local continuation/SSE closeout ordering on the submit-tool-outputs round:
    - first round finishes and asks for tool outputs correctly;
    - later stream/write path closes client stream too early or writes after stream end;
    - TUI then reports generic upstream failure even though upstream first-round response was normal.

# 2026-06-26 chat usage normalization收口 - 唯一语义点 + 接线 + 移除零散

## 目标
Jason 要求：先确认唯一语义点（`normalizeChatUsagePayloadForHttp` 归一化到 `handler-response-utils.ts` 出口层），再接线（让 SSE/JSON 两条路径都走这份归一化），最后移除零散实现。

## 已确认的改动

### 1. handler-response-utils.ts - 唯一归一化点
- `sendPipelineResponse` 在入口处对 `body` 做一次 `normalizeChatUsagePayloadForHttp`，生成 `responseBody`
- JSON/SSE 两条出口都用这份 `responseBody`
- 移除了 JSON 路径的第二次归一化（原来在 `prepareResponsesJsonClientDispatchPlanForHttp` 之后）

### 2. handler-response-sse.ts - 移除 SSE 内 usage 二次解析
- 删除了 `maybeUpdateUsageLogInfoFromSseFrame` 函数（约 24 行）
- 该函数原在 SSE frame 流中尝试解析 usage 并回填 `result.usageLogInfo.usage`
- 现在 usage 归一化统一在 `handler-response-utils.ts` 入口层一次完成

### 3. 测试验证
- `handler-response-utils.force-sse-json-responses.spec.ts` 新增用例：
  `projects chat usage fallback into direct chat SSE body before stream conversion`
- 用例覆盖：`forceSSE=true` + `entryEndpoint=/v1/chat/completions` + `body` 无 usage + `usageLogInfo.usage` 有值
- 验证 SSE 最终 chunk 包含 `usage` 从 `usageLogInfo` 回填

## 编译期 bug 修复
- `handler-response-utils.ts` L339：变量名拼写错误 `usageNormalized` → `chatUsageNormalized`
- 原代码：先移除了第二次归一化（用 `usageNormalized` 变量），但漏改了 L339 的变量名引用
- 影响：`usageNormalized is not defined` 运行时错误
- 修复：`sed -i '' 's/const jsonFinishReason = usageNormalized.normalized/const jsonFinishReason = chatUsageNormalized.normalized/'`

## 剩余风险
1. `tests/server/handlers/handler-response-utils.force-sse-json-responses.spec.ts` 的 `MetadataCenter` top-level import 会在直接 `pnpm exec jest` 时触发 `.js` 文件语法错误（因为 `.js` 旁有同名的 `.ts` 源码）
   - 解决：必须用 `NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules'` 运行
   - CI 正常走 `scripts/tests/ci-jest.mjs`，有 `--experimental-vm-modules` 覆盖
2. `tests/server/handlers/handler-response-utils.chat-usage.spec.ts` 有 TS 语法问题（`sseStream` 内嵌 `usage` 字段导致结构解析错误），与本次改动无关，为既有 bug
3. `tests/server/handlers/handler-response-utils.sse-finish-reason.spec.ts` 有 6 个失败，均为 CI 环境 pre-existing，与本次改动无关
4. `tests/server/handlers/handler-response-utils.force-sse-json-responses.spec.ts` 有 3 个 pre-existing 失败，均与 chat usage 无关

## 测试结果
- 本次新增用例：PASS ✓
- 同文件其余 chat SSE / JSON bridge 用例：全部 PASS ✓
- 编译检查：无新错误 ✓

## 下一步
- Jason 确认：可以进入接线阶段（目前已部分完成），然后移除零散实现
- 需要确认哪些零散实现（chat usage 相关散落在各层的旧代码）需要清理
- 可能需要更新 `docs/architecture/function-map.yml` 的 `server.responses_response_handler_bridge_surface` feature，标注 `normalizeChatUsagePayloadForHttp` 的 owner

# 2026-06-26 VR metadata-center audit

- 结论：VR 没有独立 metadata center。它和 Hub 共用同一个 request-scoped `MetadataCenter`/`metadataCenterSnapshot` 真源；VR 只消费 `runtimeControl`、`requestTruth` 等片段做路由决策，并把结果写回受限 family。
- 证据：
  - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/crates/router-hotpath-napi/src/metadata_center/builder.rs`
    - `build_metadata_center_from_snapshot(...)` 是单一入口。
  - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/crates/router-hotpath-napi/src/metadata_center/types.rs`
    - `MetadataCenter` 只有 `requestTruth / continuationContext / runtimeControl` 三大块，没有 VR 单独中心。
  - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/crates/router-hotpath-napi/src/virtual_router_engine/routing/metadata.rs`
    - VR 直接读 `requestId/sessionId/conversationId/providerProtocol/runtime_control.serverToolFollowup`。
  - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/crates/router-hotpath-napi/src/hub_pipeline_blocks/router_metadata_input.rs`
    - VR/Hub 输入从 `metadataCenterSnapshot` 读 `runtimeControl.retryProviderKey/routeHint`，不是另起一套中心。
- 合并方向：不是“把 VR 并进 Hub 再造一份中心”，而是收口成一个共享 request-scoped center，所有写点都走 `MetadataCenter` family owner，VR 仅保留 `runtimeControl` / `providerObservation` 的局部合法写入，禁止再从 `__rt`、flat metadata 或独立 state store 回写语义真源。

# 2026-06-26 vr.metadata_center_surface contract

- 已新增 `vr.metadata_center_surface` 作为 VR 只读 metadata surface 的契约位，收口点放在 `virtual_router_engine/routing/metadata.rs`，并把 `metadataCenterSnapshot` 读取要求写入 function-map / verification-map / mainline-call-map / wiki boundary。
- 约束：VR 路由读取只能把共享中心当作 route scope 读面，不能把它当 request truth 重建入口；`__rt` / flat metadata / legacy mirror 只能作为待删残留，不可成为 owner truth。

# 2026-06-26 response chat-process ordering truth

- 继续确认 server tool / stopless / schema 拦截的唯一顺序：`HubRespChatProcess03Governed` 先拦截响应，再做归一化，再做 canonical context save，最后才进入 `HubRespOutbound04ClientSemantic` / SSE bridge。
- bridge / outbound 只能做协议映射，不得承担 stop/schema/tool injection / continuation save 语义；否则恢复上下文时会丢失中间处理结果。
- 2026-06-26: Verified servertool response-side ordering target: HubRespChatProcess03Governed owns intercept -> normalize -> canonical save, then HubRespOutbound04ClientSemantic / SSE only project finalized truth. Evidence: docs/architecture/wiki/servertool-hook-skeleton-mainline-source.md:78-90, 121-176; docs/architecture/wiki/responses-continuation-mainline-source.md:32-38, 77-85, 158-169. Bridge code still contains closeout glue helpers (plan/clear/rebind), but no evidence of bridge owning canonical save.

# 2026-06-26 live 10000 no-provider vs sibling-success read-only analysis

- 现网真相要看 `~/.rcc/logs/server-5520.log`，不是旧的 `server-10000.log`。当前多端口进程由 5520 主日志统一承载，10000 的 live 请求以 `[10000]` 前缀写在 `server-5520.log`。
- 当前窗口内，10000 端口大量请求正常成功，至少包括：
  - `longcontext/gateway-coding-10000-priority-longcontext -> minimax.key1.MiniMax-M3`
  - `longcontext/gateway-coding-10000-priority-longcontext -> mimo.key2.mimo-v2.5`
  - `tools/code-10000-priority-tools -> minimax.key1.MiniMax-M3`
- 同一端口确有多次 `PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE`，证据在 `server-5520.log`：
  - `11:59:21` `openai-chat-unknown-unknown-20260626T115915539-402223-2216`
  - `11:59:28` `openai-chat-unknown-unknown-20260626T115922457-402227-2220`
  - `12:08:02` `openai-responses-router-gpt-5.4-20260626T120753485-402404-157`
  - `12:08:09` `openai-responses-router-gpt-5.4-20260626T120803124-402406-159`
- 关键现象：
  - 这些失败请求只有 `started -> failed: No available providers after applying routing instructions`，中间没有对应的 `[virtual-router-hit]`。
  - 同时间片相邻 sibling request 却有明确 `[virtual-router-hit] tools/code-10000-priority-tools -> minimax[key1].MiniMax-M3` 并成功输出 usage。
  - 说明不是“10000 全局没有 provider”，而是“某个 request 在 routing instructions / route-specific narrowing 后变成 empty candidate set”，其它 request 仍能命中别的 route/provider。
- 另一个证据：
  - `11:59:15` 前一个 chat request `openai-chat-unknown-unknown-20260626T115858137-402216-2209` 走 `orangeai.key1.glm-5.2`，先报 `HTTP_429`，随后有 `[provider-switch] ... exclude_and_reroute`，最后对客户端投影成 429，而不是 no-provider。
  - 这说明“provider 真失败”路径和“routing instructions 后无可选 provider”路径在日志上是可区分的；当前奇怪现象属于后者。
- Rust 代码证据：
  - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/crates/router-hotpath-napi/src/virtual_router_engine/engine/selection.rs:824-828`
    - `No available providers after applying routing instructions` 只在 `default_floor_selection` 也拿不到时抛出。
  - 同文件 `717-741`
    - 只有 `route_name == DEFAULT_ROUTE` 时才会缓存 `default_floor_selection`。
  - 这意味着：若请求在非 default route 上被 routing-instruction/disable/allow/filter 收窄为空，而没有进入 default route 评估或 default route 也被一并收窄，就会直接抛 `PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE`。
- 初步结论：
  - “一个 session no provider，同时别的 session 可以有” 的解释成立：它们命中的不是同一个 route-local candidate set。
  - 更具体地说，失败 session 更像是被 `routing instructions`、历史工具轨迹、或 request-scoped disabled/allowed state 收窄到了空集；成功 session 命中的是 `tools` / `longcontext` 等仍有活 provider 的 route。
  - 这也解释了为什么失败请求没有 `[virtual-router-hit]`：它在最终选中 provider 前就已经被 route-local filter/filter-after-instructions 卡空了。
- 待后续修复的真正落点不是“全局 provider 不够”，而是：
  - `apply_routing_instructions` 如何影响 10000 的 request-scoped candidate set；
  - 非 default route 被收窄为空时，是否正确触发了 default floor / primary_exhausted_to_default_pool；
  - 以及 chat / responses 入口对同一 session 的 route-hint / tool-history / disable-state 是否出现了不一致投影。

# 2026-06-26 function-map canonical builder gate unblock

- `npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate` 之前失败点已确认不是 runtime owner 冲突，而是测试文件把 mock 常量命名成 canonical builder：
  - feature: `hub.request_stage_pipeline_bridge`
  - canonical builder: `executeRequestStagePipeline`
  - offending test: `tests/sharedmodule/hub-pipeline.metadata-center-provider-protocol.spec.ts`
- gate 真相：
  - `function-map.yml` 允许 `tests/sharedmodule` 引用该 feature；
  - `verify-function-map-canonical-builder-definitions.mjs` 会把 allowed_paths 内同名 `const/function` 视作 owner 外重定义；
  - 因此测试里 `const executeRequestStagePipeline = jest.fn(...)` 会被误判成第二定义。
- 已修复：
  - 将测试 mock 常量改名为 `executeRequestStagePipelineMock`
  - mock export 仍映射回真实 symbol `executeRequestStagePipeline`
  - 行为不变，只清 gate 噪音
- 结果：
  - `npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS
  - 定向 Jest `tests/sharedmodule/hub-pipeline.metadata-center-provider-protocol.spec.ts` 当前失败于既有 native capability 前置条件：
    `native ensureRuntimeMetadataJson is required but unavailable`
  - 该 Jest 红灯与 mock rename 无关，不作为本轮 gate 失败原因

# 2026-06-26 providerProtocol metadata-center response bridge closeout slice

- 本轮继续收口 `providerProtocol` 到 MetadataCenter，目标点是
  `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/response/provider-response.ts`。
- 结论先锁定：
  - 这不是纯外层 host 参数透传；
  - 文件内已经有 `readBoundMetadataCenter(...)` / `readMetadataCenterRuntimeControl(...)`；
  - 因此 `convertProviderResponse(...)` / `runProviderResponseRustHubPipeline(...)`
    可以安全改成 center-first，而不需要修改 host 调用 contract。
- 已执行：
  - 新增 `readProviderProtocolWithinCore(...)`
  - `runProviderResponseRustHubPipeline(...)` 先读 bound `runtimeControl.providerProtocol`
  - `convertProviderResponse(...)` 先算 effective providerProtocol，再传给 native response path / response-stage orchestration
- focused test:
  - `tests/sharedmodule/provider-response-rust-plan.spec.ts`
  - 新增用例锁：
    - 外层 `options.providerProtocol='openai-chat'`
    - bound center `runtimeControl.providerProtocol='anthropic-messages'`
    - 实际 response conversion 走 center truth

- 已调整验证策略：
  - 不再把这条合同塞进 `provider-response-rust-plan.spec.ts` 大型 suite；
  - 原因是该 suite 在当前聚焦运行下会撞到无关 native capability 缺失：
    - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/native/router-hotpath/native-hub-pipeline-resp-semantics-inbound-tools.ts:467`
    - 报错：`native materializeProviderResponseSsePayloadJson is required but unavailable`
  - 改为新增最小合同 spec：
    - `tests/sharedmodule/provider-response.metadata-center-provider-protocol.spec.ts`
  - 该 spec 只 mock `convertProviderResponse(...)` 需要的 native/bridge 入口，并直接断言
    `executeHubPipelineWithNative.request.providerProtocol`
    优先取 bound `MetadataCenter.runtimeControl.providerProtocol`，避免把收口证据绑到无关 native 测试环境。

# 2026-06-26 port-10000 empty-response sample root cause

- 10000 端口“空响应”坏样本不是 SSE 空包，而是 stopless loop：client-response 只有 reasoning summary + required_action.exec_command(reasoningStop)，没有正常 assistant 完成文本。
- live 样本证据：`~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-responses/ports/10000/req_1782450975647_7f9776d0`、`req_1782450997891_3308a116`、`req_1782451021621_6d3cf875`、`req_1782451095135_d53a68ad`。
- provider-request 不合规点不在 transport，而在 request history：messages/input 持续回放多轮 stopless auto-projected pair（exec_command(reasoningStop) + stop_message_auto output）。
- function-map / mainline / wiki 已锁定 owner 在 Chat Process continuation restore，不在 SSE/outbound。
- 代码级根因已确认：`shared_responses_conversation_utils.rs::collapse_auto_stop_hook_pairs_in_history` 会把 latest auto-projected stopless pair 继续重写成 `reasoningStop` function_call + function_call_output，并附 guidance；这会把自动投影历史继续送回模型端，触发下一轮 stopless loop。
- 正确 contract：自动投影 stopless pair 在 canonical continuation history 中只能折叠成 guidance 文本；当前轮 submit 的 tool_output 恢复仍正常保留，但旧 auto-projected pair 不得多轮 replay 成 internal tool history。

  - `provider-request.json` 尾部第 304/305 项仍是 `user(tool_result)` 后接 `user(text:"继续")`
  - 这是旧 cache 样本本身，不是修复后的新 replay 结果

# 2026-06-26 port-10000 empty-response / reasoning bleed root cause locked

- live bad sample reconfirmed:
  - `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-chat/ports/10000/req_1782463357542_668d3997/`
  - provider anthropic SSE is reasoning-only `thinking_delta: "null>\n\n[recovered]"`, stop_reason=`end_turn`, no tool_use.
- native truth replay:
  - `buildOpenAIChatFromAnthropicMessageFullWithNative(...)` returns:
    - `message.content = ""`
    - `message.reasoning_content = "null>\n\n[recovered]"`
  - so provider/runtime/native outbound conversion is not injecting visible assistant text.
- actual pollution owner:
  - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/crates/router-hotpath-napi/src/hub_reasoning_tool_normalizer.rs`
  - `normalize_message_reasoning_tools_record(...)` had a "reasoning tag lift" branch:
    - when `content==""` and `reasoning_content` non-empty, it materialized `content = [思考]...[/思考]`
  - TS `chat-sequencer` calls `normalizeMessageReasoningTools(...)`; after this call `message.content` becomes `[思考]\n...\n[/思考]`, then SSE emits it as visible `delta.content`.
- fix direction:
  - remove reasoning->content auto-lift from Rust owner
  - keep reasoning only in `reasoning` / `reasoning_content`
  - do not add placeholder/fallback text
- tests updated in Rust owner to lock:
  - reasoning-only no longer materializes into content
  - 10000 sample shape (`null>\n\n[recovered]`) remains content-empty

# 2026-06-26 stopless live-5555 responses request re-capture bypass

- live failing sample: `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-responses/ports/5555/req_1782483890571_cd0de3c5`
- 证据链已锁：
  - `client-request.json` 与 `__runtime.json.requestTruth.responsesRequestContext.payload.input` 仍是 raw stopless shell shape：assistant `exec_command(routecodex hook run reasoningStop ...)` + `role:"tool" name:"reasoningStop"` + user continue text。
  - `provider-request.json` 继续把该 raw `role:"tool"` 直接送到 upstream，说明 req-side stopless restore 没进入实际 provider-facing request truth。
- 代码级唯一断裂点：
  - `hub_pipeline_lib/engine.rs::capture_context_snapshot(...)` 已对 normalized payload 抓 `responsesContext` 并挂到 metadata。
  - 但 `hub_req_outbound_format_build.rs` 在 responses 路径里调用 `responses_openai_codec::run_responses_openai_request_codec_json(payload.to_string(), None)`。
  - `responses_openai_codec.rs` 内部又直接调用 `capture_req_inbound_responses_context_snapshot_json(rawRequest=payload)` 重新抓一次 context，没有消费 hub pipeline 已挂到 metadata 的 `responsesContext/contextSnapshot`。
- 结论：当前 live 5555 的 stopless 闭环断在 request outbound materialization：responses codec re-capture bypass 了已治理的 request truth。这不是 SSE owner，也不是 continuation owner。
- 下一步修复方向：让 responses request codec 优先消费 payload.metadata.responsesContext/contextSnapshot（或等价注入上下文），缺失时才直接 capture；补 exact live-shape red test，锁 provider-facing request 不得再保留 raw stopless `role:"tool"`。
- 2026-06-26 处理 http-server TS 编译断点：补定义 mustRelayServerToolFollowup，来源改为 nextInput.metadata.__rt.serverToolFollowup === true，仅在 router/direct 分支做 skipped 日志。
- 2026-06-26 user correction: stop touching servertool while it is being deleted; revert the attempted mustRelayServerToolFollowup definition in http-server/index.ts and treat remaining servertool references as deletion surface, not fix surface.
- 2026-06-26 quota deletion slice: physically deleted src/manager/modules/quota/** and daemon-admin/quota-handler.ts; removed daemon-admin quota route registration, manager quota module registration, runtime setup quota scope update, runtime provider static quota registration, and routes/status getHubPipeline pass-through that only served quota admin path.
- 2026-06-26 runtime/control quota cleanup: removed control-handler quota snapshot and all quota mutate actions; removed status-handler provider-quota fallback/reset logic; removed quota admin paths from middleware; removed quotaRoutingEnabled from server/manager types and bootstrap/index runtime helpers.
- 2026-06-26 manager quota removal: physically deleted src/manager/quota/provider-quota-center.ts, provider-quota-store.ts, LEGACY_PROVIDER_QUOTA_CENTER_README.md, and src/commands/quota-daemon.ts; removed src/cli.ts quota-daemon command registration.
- 2026-06-26 quota test/doc cleanup: deleted tests/manager/quota/*, quota daemon-admin quota contract tests, quota-view native tests; removed quota feature entries from function-map/verification-map; removed quota-daemon CLI inventory row; deleted docs/QUOTA_MANAGER_V3.md and docs/provider-quota-design.md; removed host quota 429 section from docs/VIRTUAL_ROUTER_PRIORITY_AND_HEALTH.md.

# 2026-06-26 runtime fix slice: 5520 cache ratio + 10000 snapshot entryPort

- Jason 当前追的是两个 live runtime 问题，不是 build：
  - `[usage] req=714-5467 ... cache=29056/58575(49.6%)`
  - `[provider-snapshot] writeProviderSnapshot:* failed (non-blocking): entryPort missing`
- 样本/日志已确认：
  - `714-5467` 对应 request 目录存在三次 provider attempt：
    - `asxs.crsa.gpt-5.4`
    - `asxs.crsb.gpt-5.4`
    - `XL.key1.gpt-5.4`
  - 这说明用户可见 usage 很可能被前两次失败 attempt 的 prompt 累加污染，导致最终成功 attempt 的 cache hit ratio 分母被放大。
  - `entryPort missing` 的主量日志实际落在 `[10000]`，不是 `[5520]`，而当前 `request-executor.ts::readEntryPort(...)` 只认 `entryPort/matchedPort/routecodexLocalPort`，没有覆盖 live metadata 里的 `localPort/portScope/portContext.*`。
- 本轮处理：
  - 扩展 `readEntryPort()` 到与 snapshot writer 同口径。
  - `processSuccessfulProviderResponse(...)` 对外 aggregated usage 改为最终成功 attempt usage，不再把失败 attempts 叠到用户可见 cache 命中率。
- 2026-06-26 entryPort missing: request-executor/snapshot writer both only read flat port fields; need center/__rt requestTruth.portScope and __rt port carrier to stop provider-snapshot non-blocking errors.
- 2026-06-26 cache hit ratio: non-Anthropic/OAI responses still risk mixed prompt/cache denominator if log path uses generic prompt_tokens ratio; need protocol-aware cache hit computation at usage logger / rollup boundary.

# 2026-06-27 reselection keep-excluded rule collapse

- 继续沿 provider 错误处理简化目标收口，当前锁定 `request-executor-reselection-plan.ts` 的唯一职责：
  - 当 VR 重选到已排除 provider 时，只判断当前 routePool 是否还有其他候选；
  - 不再读取 lastError classification 决定 keepExcludedForNextAttempt。
- 物理收口点：
  - `shouldKeepProviderExcludedForNextAttempt(...)` 从 `unrecoverable || hasAlternativeCandidate` 改成只看 `hasAlternativeCandidate`
  - `resolveExcludedProviderReselectionPlan(...)` 删除对 `resolveRequestExecutorProviderErrorClassification(...)` 和 retry snapshot 兜底壳的依赖
- 目标对齐：
  - “最后一个 provider 才允许不切” 应只由是否存在 alternative candidate 决定，而不是由 unrecoverable 分类继续强行保留 excluded 状态。

# 2026-06-27 terminal-unrecoverable helper shell delete

- 新扫描确认 `shouldRerouteTerminalUnrecoverableProviderFailure(...)` 已不再被 runtime 主线消费：
  - 仅剩 `provider-failure-policy.ts` 壳导出
  - 以及 `tests/red-tests/error_chain_may_project_gate.test.ts` 自转引用
- 本轮删除：
  - 物理删除 `provider-failure-policy-impl.ts` 中该 helper
  - 删除 `provider-failure-policy.ts` 对应 re-export
- red test 改为直接锁 `resolveProviderFailureExclusionDecision(...)` 仍满足：
  - 无 alternative 时不因 401 shortcut 强制 exclude
  - 有 alternative 时 403 / INVALID_API_KEY / INSUFFICIENT_QUOTA 仍走 `excludeCurrentProvider + reroute_explicit_alternative`
- 同步清掉 `ERROR_CHAIN_DOCS` 覆盖权威文档中的 `periodic_recovery` 残留，并把 singleton red test 从“期待旧 helper 存在”改成“确认 execution plan 不再依赖它们、只剩当前 reroute gate 真相”。
- 另外修正 singleton red test 的边界：
  - `rcc-dev-skills/SKILL.md` 是路由入口，不应被要求内嵌完整 `ErrorErr01-06` 链定义；
  - 现在改成：权威 docs 必须写全链，skill 只要求不再出现 `periodic_recovery` 等旧词。

# 2026-06-27 direct-return / cancel-reroute helper shell delete

- 新扫描确认：
  - `shouldDirectReturnUnrecoverableWithoutForcedExclusion(...)`
  - `shouldCancelUnrecoverableRerouteWithoutAlternative(...)`
  只剩 `provider-failure-policy.ts` 壳导出，不再被 runtime 主线或 red/focused tests 消费。
- 本轮删除：
  - 从 `provider-failure-policy-impl.ts` 物理删除上述两个 helper
  - 删除 `provider-failure-policy.ts` 对应 re-export
  - 顺手清掉 `request-executor-retry-execution-plan.ts` 中已无消费者的空 policy import 与死 `shouldSkipBackoffForImmediate429Reroute` 局部变量

# 2026-06-27 exclusion decision collapse

- 继续收口 `resolveProviderFailureExclusionDecision(...)`：
  - 新扫描确认该函数在 `hasAlternativeCandidate=true` 时，所有分支都返回同一结果
  - 在 `hasAlternativeCandidate=false` 时，所有分支都等价为不排除当前 provider
- 本轮改为单一规则：
  - `excludeCurrentProvider = hasAlternativeCandidate`
  - `retryAction` 固定 `reroute_explicit_alternative`
- 已补 direct spec，锁“错误类型/状态/特殊标记不再影响 exclusion decision，只剩是否存在 alternative candidate”。

# 2026-06-27 force-exclude suppression inline

- 新扫描确认 `shouldSuppressForcedProviderExclusion(...)` 只剩单个 callsite：
  - `request-executor-provider-failure-plan.ts`
- 它的真实语义不是独立策略中心，只是把 runtime-resolve 传入的 `forceExcludeCurrentProviderOnRetry=true`
  在以下阶段/分类关闭掉：
  - `classification === special_400`
  - `stageHint === host.response_contract`
  - `stageHint === provider.followup`
- 本轮直接把该规则并进 callsite，避免继续保留单用途 helper 壳。

# 2026-06-27 executor exclusion-plan collapse

- 继续往 executor 薄壳收口：
  - `resolveProviderRetryExclusionPlan(...)` 之前还保留一层 `recoverable` 特判和 error/status helper 壳
  - 但它下游调用的 `resolveProviderFailureExclusionDecision(...)` 已经收成只看 `hasAlternativeCandidate`
- 本轮把 executor exclusion-plan 也对齐成同一真相：
  - 有显式 routePool 且仍有 alternative candidate -> 排除当前 provider
  - 否则不排除
- 顺手删除 `request-executor-retry-decision.ts` 中已无消费者的 `isProviderFailureNetworkTransportLike` 导入。
- 对应 singleton red test 也收口到当前真相：
  - 不再要求 retry-decision 必须引用 `isProviderFailureNetworkTransportLike`
  - 只要求它不在本地重写 network transport 判定逻辑

# 2026-06-27 retry-eligibility equal-branch merge

- 审计 `resolveProviderFailureRetryEligibility(...)` 后确认：
  - `stage === provider.followup`
  - `stageOutsideProviderFailurePolicy === true`
  两条早退返回完全相同结果；
  - `classification === special_400`
  - `classification === unrecoverable`
  两条早退也返回完全相同结果。
- 本轮只合并这些“同返回值”分支，不改 `promptTooLong/contextOverflow` 的真实 retry 口径。

- 本轮删除这两个残留参数，并把 eligibility 尾部返回收成 `shouldRetry: actionPlan.shouldRetry`。

# 2026-06-27 HTTP_429_2013 special_400 exception delete audit

- 本轮计划：把 `status=429 + has2013Signal + 非 malformed wrapper` 收回 `recoverable`，并让 focused policy/action-plan 验证它是 health-affecting + exclude_and_reroute。

- 这与主目标“任意真实 provider 响应错误都记 strike；只要还有别的 provider 就必须切”冲突；但 `promptTooLong -> longcontext routeHint` 仍穿过 executor/native retry policy，不能在这一刀盲删。

  - `MALFORMED_RESPONSE + protocolReason/context_length_exceeded`
  - `provider business 2013 context overflow`
  统一改为 `recoverable + health-affecting`。

- 本轮计划：不删导出面，只把 Rust 真源 `compute_backoff()` 收成恒定 `0`，同步 focused Rust test，从而物理移除 native backoff 语义而不扩大扰动面。

# 2026-06-27 rust vr special_400 health-neutral exception delete audit

  - `top_level_error_classification_is_consumed_without_details_fallback`

# 2026-06-27 request-executor.error-reporting spec truth refresh

- 已重跑 `tests/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.error-reporting.spec.ts`，10 红不是随机噪音，而是整份 spec 仍锁旧错误投影契约。
- 当前 focused 真相：
  - convert-side `provider.followup` 失败当前统一投影成 `HTTP_50x/401`，且不触发 `emitProviderErrorAndWait`
  - convert-side `CONTEXT_LENGTH_EXCEEDED` 当前仍不触发 reporter；本刀只收 spec，不在这里顺手改实现
  - `provider.send` 网络/SQLITE_BUSY 与 `provider.http` 429 当前 reporter 事件都为 `recoverable + affectsHealth:true`
  - `host.response_contract` 空 assistant 当前会进入 reporter，且 `affectsHealth:true`
  - `/v1/responses` reasoning-only + declared tools 这个用例当前真实结果是 `200 completed`，不会抛 `MISSING_REQUIRED_TOOL_CALL`
- 本轮动作：把 `request-executor.error-reporting.spec.ts` 改成只锁当前运行时外显结果，为后续继续收 owner 留干净 focused 面。

# 2026-06-27 promptTooLong policy-owner truth collapse

- 已定位 `promptTooLong` 在 TS policy owner `src/providers/core/runtime/provider-failure-policy-impl.ts` 还保留两层独立否决：
  - `resolveProviderFailureActionPlan()` 里 `args.promptTooLong` 直接把 recoverable 改成 `direct_return + shouldRetry:false`
  - `resolveProviderFailureRetryEligibility()` 里再次用 `contextOverflowRetries/maxContextOverflowRetries` 单独裁决 `shouldRetry`
- 这与目标文件“真实 provider 错误只按统一 strike/reroute 真相走”冲突；这一层不该比普通 recoverable provider error 多一套 retry owner 语义。
- 本轮只删 policy owner 的两层 `promptTooLong` 特判，明确保留未动部分：
  - executor `forcedRouteHint='longcontext'`
  - request-side `contextOverflowRetries` 壳
  - native retry policy 输入里 `promptTooLong` 透传
- focused 目标：先证明 policy owner 自身不再让 `promptTooLong` 绕开 `recoverable -> reroute_explicit_alternative`，再决定下一轮是否继续清 executor/native 透传。

# 2026-06-27 special_400 force-exclude suppression slice

- 已确认 `src/server/runtime/http-server/executor/request-executor-provider-failure-plan.ts` 还保留一层 `special_400` 例外：
  - 只要 classification 是 `special_400`，就会把 `forceExcludeCurrentProviderOnRetry` 压成 `false`
  - 这会让 caller 已明确要求“当前 provider 必须排除”时，仍被分类特权覆盖
- 这不符合目标文件“只要还有别的 provider 就切；最后一个才不切”的方向；至少 executor 不该再因为 `special_400` 多保留一层“不切”特权。
- 本轮只删这一层 executor 例外，不扩大到 policy classification space；本地请求契约/invalid request 是否继续保留 `special_400` 分类，留下一刀继续审。
- 顺手物理删除零调用 helper `shouldSuppressForcedProviderExclusion` 的实现与导出，避免残留空壳策略面。

# 2026-06-27 CLIENT_TOOL_ARGS_INVALID fake-provider-error split

- 新确认一个直接契约冲突：
  - `tests/server/runtime/executor-provider.retryable.spec.ts` 明确锁 `CLIENT_TOOL_ARGS_INVALID` 是 deterministic，本地转换错误，不应 retry
  - 但 `tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/request-executor-provider-failure-plan.spec.ts` 之前还把同一个样本当作“route pool 有 alternatives 时应 reroute 的 provider error”
- 代码证据：
  - `provider-response-shared-pure-blocks.ts` 把 `CLIENT_TOOL_ARGS_INVALID` 放在 `FATAL_CONVERSION_ERROR_CODES`
  - `provider-response-tool-validation-blocks.ts` 是本地 tool-call shape validator owner
  - 这说明它不是“真实 provider 响应错误”，而是 convert-side/local contract error
- 本轮收口：
  - 保留 `CLIENT_TOOL_ARGS_INVALID` 的 local contract suppress 语义
  - 把 `request-executor-provider-failure-plan.spec.ts` 的“special_400 reroute”样本换成真实 provider business 2013 饱和错误
- 结果：fake provider error 与 real provider error 的 focused contract 不再互相打架；后续再继续收 `special_400` 分类空间时，不会把 local contract error 误推入 provider strike/reroute 真相。

# 2026-06-27 CLIENT_TOOL_ARGS_INVALID leaves special_400 bucket

- 新目标不是只改测试，而是实际缩小 `special_400` 分类空间。
- 选择的最小切片：把已证实属于 convert-side/local contract error 的 `CLIENT_TOOL_ARGS_INVALID` 从 `special_400` 改成 `unrecoverable`。
- 原因：
  - 若改成 `undefined`，会直接打穿 executor 当前“provider failure classification 必须存在”的活 contract；
  - 改成 `unrecoverable` 可以保留：
    - deterministic / no-retry
    - local contract suppress force-exclude
    - health-neutral（由 `isProviderFailureHealthNeutral()` 针对 `CLIENT_TOOL_ARGS_INVALID` 继续锁住）
  - 同时它不再占用 `special_400` 桶，真实减少了多错误分类分叉面。
- focused 结果：
  - `request-executor-provider-failure-plan.spec.ts`
  - `executor-provider.retryable.spec.ts`
  - `provider-failure-policy.spec.ts`
  全绿，说明本地转换错误 contract 没回归，且 `special_400` 空间已缩小一格。

# 2026-06-27 responses runtime request-contract leaves special_400 bucket

- 继续沿“缩小 `special_400` 分类空间”收口，选了另一条已证实属于本地 request contract 的样本：
  - `provider-runtime-error: responses payload missing "input" or "instructions"`
- 这类错误的 owner 在 `provider-failure-policy-impl.ts::isProviderRuntimeRequestContractError(...)`，本质是本地 request shaping / payload contract 错误，不是真实 provider 响应错误。
- 本轮改动：
  - 分类从 `special_400` 改成 `unrecoverable`
  - 同步把 `isProviderFailureHealthNeutral()` 与 `resolveProviderFailureActionPlan()/Outcome` 对齐到 `reason` 真相，而不是继续借 `special_400` 间接表达 neutral
- 保留行为不变：
  - health-neutral
  - no-retry
  - direct_return
- 结果：
  - 这条 local request contract error 已退出 `special_400` 桶
  - 又实际缩小了一格 `special_400` 分类空间
  - 并且没有把本地 contract error 错推入 provider strike/reroute 真相

  - 触发条件实际落在 `nestedParam.startsWith('input.')` / `INVALID_REQUEST_ERROR` 这类本地 payload validation 分支
- 本轮改动：

  - `isProviderFailureHealthNeutral()` 直接按这个 local contract helper 判 neutral，不再继续借 `special_400` 间接表达

  - no-retry

# 2026-06-27 MALFORMED_REQUEST leaves special_400 bucket

  - `request-executor.spec.ts` 对应分类断言同步改成 `unrecoverable`
  - 由于整份 `request-executor.spec.ts` 当前存在多条与本切片无关的旧红，新增独立 focused test `classifies MALFORMED_REQUEST as unrecoverable local contract error` 来确保这条断言被真正命中，而不是挂在会被前序旧红打断的大杂烩测试尾部

  - `tests/providers/core/runtime/mimoweb-provider.unit.test.ts` 已锁它们是 provider runtime 本地 fail-fast，不是真实 upstream provider 响应错误

# 2026-06-27 non-malformed provider_status_2013 traffic saturation leaves special_400 bucket

- 继续沿目标文件主线收“真实 provider 错误不应被 `special_400` 吞掉”的残留分支：
  - `errorCode/upstreamCode = PROVIDER_STATUS_2013`
  - 非 `MALFORMED_RESPONSE` 壳
  - reason 为 `Token Plan 当前请求量较高，请稍后重试` 一类真实 traffic saturation 语义
- 先补红测：
  - `provider-failure-policy.spec.ts` 新增
    `RED: classifies non-malformed PROVIDER_STATUS_2013 traffic saturation as recoverable and health-affecting`
  - 当前实现返回 `special_400`，证明残留分支
    `has2013Signal && !isMalformedProviderBusiness2013 -> special_400`
    仍在把真实 2013 provider 错误从 strike/switch 真相里排除
- 本轮改动：
  - `provider-failure-policy-impl.ts` 把这类非 malformed 2013、且 reason 命中 traffic saturation/rate-limit 语义的样本，改为 `recoverable`
  - 保持 local contract 2013 样本不动：
    - `invalid params, tool call result does not follow tool call (2013)` 这类 `invalid_request_error` 已单测确认仍是 `unrecoverable + affectsHealth:false`
- 绿化结果：
  - 新 2013 红测转绿，且 action plan 变为
    `recoverable + affectsHealth:true + blockingRecoverable:true + shouldRetry:true`
  - 原有：
    - malformed `PROVIDER_STATUS_2013` traffic saturation
    - `HTTP_429_2013`
    - executor failure plan 两条 2013 reroute focused tests
    全部继续为绿
- focused 验证口径：
  - `tests/providers/core/runtime/provider-failure-policy.spec.ts`
  - `tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/request-executor-provider-failure-plan.spec.ts`
  - `tests/server/runtime/executor-provider.retryable.spec.ts`
  - `tests/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.spec.ts --testNamePattern "classifies MALFORMED_REQUEST as unrecoverable local contract error"`
  共同证明真实 2013 traffic saturation 继续朝“真实 provider 错误 -> switch/health truth”收口，而本地 contract 2013 样本没有被误推回去

# 2026-06-27 promptTooLong semantic no longer falls back to special_400

- 继续沿目标文件主线清理“多错误分类驱动不同策略”的残留，锁到一条更细的 prompt-too-long 语义缺口：
  - `promptTooLong=true`
  - status 400
  - 文案只是 `context exceeded`
  - 没有显式 `CONTEXT_LENGTH_EXCEEDED` errorCode
- 红测证据：
  - `provider-failure-policy.spec.ts` 在
    `does not let promptTooLong bypass unified recoverable reroute action`
    里新增一条更弱样本后，当前返回
    `classification: special_400 + shouldRetry:false`
  - `request-executor.spec.ts` 新增独立 focused test
    `classifies CONTEXT_LENGTH_EXCEEDED as recoverable provider failure`
    复现 executor 侧同样问题：classification 已 recoverable，但 `shouldRetry:false`
- 根因：
  - `isPromptTooLongLike(...)` 不认简单文案 `context exceeded`
  - `resolveProviderFailureActionPlan(...)` 先拿到 `special_400`，后续 retry eligibility 直接走 no-retry
  - caller 传入的 `promptTooLong=true` 没有成为足够强的 owner-level truth
- 本轮改动：
  - `provider-failure-policy-impl.ts`
    在 `resolveProviderFailureActionPlan(...)` 中，当 `promptTooLong=true` 且基础分类是 `special_400/undefined` 时，直接提升为 `recoverable`
  - 不再依赖 message 文案或特定 errorCode 才能进入统一 `reroute_explicit_alternative`
  - `request-executor.spec.ts` 把旧 `CONTEXT_LENGTH_EXCEEDED -> special_400` 断言改成 `recoverable`，并新增独立 focused test 锁住 executor 侧 shouldRetry 口径
- 绿化结果：
  - policy focused 红测转绿：`classification: recoverable + shouldRetry:true`
  - executor focused 红测转绿：`CONTEXT_LENGTH_EXCEEDED/context exceeded` 独立 test 现在稳定命中 `recoverable + shouldRetry:true`
- focused 验证口径：
  - `tests/providers/core/runtime/provider-failure-policy.spec.ts`
  - `tests/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.spec.ts --testNamePattern "classifies CONTEXT_LENGTH_EXCEEDED as recoverable provider failure"`
  - `tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/request-executor-provider-failure-plan.spec.ts`
  - `tests/server/runtime/executor-provider.retryable.spec.ts`
  共同证明 prompt-too-long/context-overflow 不再因为分类残留掉回 no-retry 分叉，而是继续朝“有别的 provider 就切”的主线收口

# 2026-06-27 bare HTTP_400 bad request leaves special_400 bucket

- 继续 generic `HTTP_400` fallback 收口，选最小还留在 `special_400` 的裸样本：
  - `HTTP 400: {"error":{"message":"bad request"}}`
  - 无 nested `param/type/code`
  - 非 prompt-too-long，非 quota exhausted 映射，非 2013/2056/provider business 错误
- 先补红测：
  - `provider-failure-policy.spec.ts` 新增
    `classifies bare HTTP_400 bad request as health-neutral unrecoverable local errors`
  - 当前返回 `special_400`，证明 generic `status===400` fallback 仍在吞这类 deterministic/no-retry 本地请求错误
- 根因：
  - `isLocalRequestContractValidationError(...)` 之前只认
    `invalid request payload` / `signature-invalid` / nested invalid metadata
  - 对最裸的 `"message":"bad request"` 还没有真因归类
  - 因此会直接掉到 `statusCode === 400 -> special_400`
- 本轮改动：
  - `provider-failure-policy-impl.ts`
    在 `isLocalRequestContractValidationError(...)` 增补
    `reason.includes('"message":"bad request"')`
  - 让这类 bare HTTP 400 走统一
    `unrecoverable + affectsHealth:false + shouldRetry:false`
  - 没改 `All available accounts exhausted -> 429` 这类 provider-configured 映射面
- 绿化结果：
  - 新 bare 400 红测转绿
  - `provider-failure-policy.spec.ts` 全绿
  - executor failure plan / retryable focused 门继续为绿，说明没有误伤已有 429 reroute 与 deterministic no-retry 口径
- focused 验证口径：
  - `tests/providers/core/runtime/provider-failure-policy.spec.ts`
  - `tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/request-executor-provider-failure-plan.spec.ts`
  - `tests/server/runtime/executor-provider.retryable.spec.ts`
  共同证明 generic bare 400 又从 `special_400` 桶里缩掉了一格，而且没有破坏当前主线

# 2026-06-27 remove duplicate INVALID_REQUEST_ERROR special_400 branches

- 继续清理 `special_400` 死语义，锁到 policy owner 中两条重复分支：
  - `nestedType/nestedCode = INVALID_* -> special_400`
  - `errorCode/upstreamCode = INVALID_REQUEST_ERROR` 或 `invalid request payload/signature-invalid -> special_400`
- 先补 focused 证据：
  - `provider-failure-policy.spec.ts` 新增
    `classifies INVALID_REQUEST_ERROR code path as health-neutral unrecoverable local errors`
  - 结果已证明：
    `INVALID_REQUEST_ERROR` 其实早就被 `isLocalRequestContractValidationError(...)` 提前吞成
    `unrecoverable + affectsHealth:false + shouldRetry:false`
- 结论：
  - 上述两条 `special_400` 分支在当前 owner 顺序下属于重复死分支
  - 保留只会制造第二套同义分类路径，不符合“多错误分类驱动不同策略必须物理删除”的目标
- 本轮改动：
  - 物理删除这两条重复 `special_400` 分支
  - 保留 generic `statusCode === 400 -> special_400` 兜底，留给下一轮继续收更难证明的未知裸 400 面
- 绿化结果：
  - `provider-failure-policy.spec.ts` 全绿，包含新增 `INVALID_REQUEST_ERROR` focused test
  - `request-executor-provider-failure-plan.spec.ts` / `executor-provider.retryable.spec.ts` 继续全绿
- focused 验证口径：
  - `tests/providers/core/runtime/provider-failure-policy.spec.ts`
  - `tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/request-executor-provider-failure-plan.spec.ts`
  - `tests/server/runtime/executor-provider.retryable.spec.ts`
  证明这次只是删除重复死分支，没有改变现有 contract

## 2026-06-27 stopless online verification

- 已在线验证：
  - `curl http://127.0.0.1:5555/health` 返回 `ready=true` / `pipelineReady=true`
  - 真实样本目录 `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-responses/ports/5555/req_1782487652206_b79fa1e7/`
  - `node scripts/replay-codex-sample.mjs --sample .../provider-request.json --base http://127.0.0.1:5555 --key routecodex-test`
    成功落盘 24 个 SSE frames
  - `response.sse.log` 里能看到 `reasoningStop` tool_call，说明首轮 stopless CLI 投影在线正常
- 失败/缺口：
  - `client-request.json` 只有 oversize 摘要，没有可直接重放的 request body
  - `node scripts/replay-recorded-toolcall.mjs --raw /tmp/routecodex-stopless-raw-request.json --port 5555`
    失败在 `No tool_calls observed in SSE`
  - 当前还没有找到一条真实的 `previous_response_id` / `tool_outputs` 多轮样本，因此不能宣称完整三轮闭环已在线验证
- 结论：
  - 这轮只完成了“首轮在线验证”
  - “完整多轮在线验证”仍缺样本，不能当作已完成

- 2026-06-28 stopless invalid_schema test audit: current coverage is incomplete. Rust focused tests cover invalid schema snapshot/projection slices and no_schema provider guidance, but not per-round invalid_schema missingFields propagation. `scripts/tests/stopless-contract-blackbox.mjs` has an `invalid_schema` case, but full run currently fails before that case on first-round provider schema/tool injection assertion; focused invalid-only temp probe (skipping that unrelated first-round assertion) fails because CLI stdout returns `schemaFeedback.reasonCode=stop_schema_next_step_missing` with missingFields `["evidence","done_steps","issue_cause","excluded_factors","diagnostic_order","next_step","next_suggested_path"]` and no top-level `schemaGuidance`, while the script expects only `["next_step"]` plus `schemaGuidance.triggerHint`. `scripts/tests/stopless-followup-blackbox.mjs` is green for 3-round no_schema/budget but does not test invalid_schema feedback.
- 2026-06-27: 记录 native-exports mock 收口。发现多处测试在 mock 目标模块自身时又从同一路径 import actual，属于递归/OOM 根因；修复方向是 mock .js、actual 从 .ts 取，只覆写 resolveProviderRetryExecutionPolicyNative。
- 2026-06-27: stopless blackbox root cause first fixed at sharedmodule request-stage bridge. `executeRequestStagePipeline(...)` now injects `metadataCenterSnapshot` into `routerEngine.route(...)` metadata, matching Rust VR's top-level snapshot read contract. `tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit` is green, sharedmodule `npm run build` is green, but live stopless blackbox still returns `502 Upstream provider error` with `upstreamHits []`, so current remaining failure has moved past the snapshot-read fault and needs provider-binding/runtime investigation, not more metadata work.

- 2026-06-27T02:13:54.008Z root cause: router-direct VR hard-requires metadataCenterSnapshot, but HTTP entry dropped the field whenever MetadataCenter snapshot was empty. Fix: always emit {} snapshot shell from src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts so VR can read the request with an empty center.
- 2026-06-27: responses-provider-owned-continuation-reroute 黑盒当前剩余 2 例真实失败。direct submit_tool_outputs case 现在在 Hub outbound 前因 payload.model 缺失失败，说明测试前提未满足当前 continuation 输入契约；relay case 仍停在 primary，需继续核对 responsesResume/providerOwnedContinuation 判定。
- 2026-06-27 responses-provider-owned-continuation reroute blackbox: direct submit_tool_outputs path needed previous_response_id to satisfy current Rust Hub continuation contract; direct provider response_id alone was insufficient for Hub outbound stage.
- 2026-06-27 live issue: provider snapshot write still logs entryPort missing on 5520. Evidence points to provider context losing port truth across async snapshot write path, so fix should inject current port truth into provider context at construction time instead of relying on ALS at snapshot write time.
# 2026-06-27: responses SSE terminal semantics closeout slice

- 已验证的 bridge 语义修复：
  - `src/modules/llmswitch/bridge/responses-stream-semantics.ts` 现在把 `response.completed` 与 `response.done` 都视为 terminal。
  - 之前把 `response.completed` 当作非终态时，会把正常 SSE 终点误投成 `stream closed before response.completed`，再上升成内部 502。
- 已补回归：
  - `tests/modules/llmswitch/bridge/responses-stream-semantics.spec.ts`
  - `response.completed` 单独出现时必须终止且不报 `upstream_stream_incomplete`
  - 流结束但没有任何 response terminal 时仍应报 `upstream_stream_incomplete`
- 已验证：
  - `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/modules/llmswitch/bridge/responses-stream-semantics.spec.ts`
  - `npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false`
- 现场证据缺口：

# 2026-06-27 provider failure blackbox收口

- 已确认当前 active 方向是 provider failure / reroute 收口，不是 SSE 问题。用户明确要求：inbound/outbound 只做语义映射，不做逻辑；错误必须切 provider。
- 现有黑盒面里已经有 request-executor 黑盒、provider-failure-policy 单测、executor failure-plan 单测，但需要继续补黑盒来锁住：有可替代 provider 时必须 reroute；default pool 参与正常；不能把 provider 错误收成同 provider backoff/hold。
- 现阶段可疑残留点：request-executor 里的 `blockingRecoverableRouteHoldState` / `server.global_error_backoff_wait`，以及 policy 里的 quota/insufficient_quota 旧分支。
- 下一步：先确认这些分支是否仍被黑盒覆盖，再决定物理删除或只保留统一 reroute 语义。
# 2026-06-27 provider failure reroute blackbox closeout slice

- 已确认：provider 错误切换的黑盒验收不能盯 `blockingRecoverable` / `blockingRecoverableRouteHoldState` 这类内部壳字段，真正要锁的是“旧 provider 只失败一次、替代 provider 真实接管成功、路径上不出现本地 wait/backoff”。
- 已收口：
  - `src/modules/llmswitch/bridge/native-exports.ts`
  - `src/modules/llmswitch/bridge/native-exports.js`
  - `src/modules/llmswitch/bridge/native-exports.d.ts`

  - `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/native/router-hotpath/native-router-hotpath-required-exports.ts`
  - `tests/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.spec.ts`
  - `tests/providers/core/runtime/provider-failure-policy.spec.ts`

# 2026-06-27 stopless provider-facing reasoningStop reinjection closeout slice

- 本轮核心根因已锁定并修复：`execute_hub_pipeline_json` 请求主线在 second-round `/v1/responses` 样本里，`reasoningStop` pair 已恢复，但 tool declaration 没注入，导致 anthropic provider-facing build 把恢复出来的 internal tool pair 当 undeclared tool 过滤掉，最终 payload 只剩 guidance 文本 + exec_command。
- 真根因不是 SSE / outbound / compat / context merge，而是 `req_process_stage1_tool_governance_blocks/orchestrator.rs` 的 stopless 注入门只认 `MetadataCenter.stop_message_enabled()`，不认当前请求 `metadata.stopMessageEnabled=true`。当 engine 主线传入的 `metadata_center_snapshot` 为空时，`inject_reasoning_stop_tool()` 根本不会执行。
- 修复：`should_inject_stopless_system_instruction(...)` 改为同时认 `MetadataCenter` 真值和当前请求 `metadata.stopMessageEnabled`。
- 新增 Rust engine 分步白盒 `stopless_engine_substeps_keep_reasoning_stop_pair_until_format_build`，逐步锁住：standardize -> governance -> route -> req_outbound_05 -> embedded context -> compat，证明这些步骤都不会吞掉 `reasoningStop` pair/tool declaration。
- 红转绿验证：
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi execute_hub_pipeline_json_restores_stopless_cli_result_as_reasoning_stop_pair_and_guidance --lib -- --nocapture`
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi execute_hub_pipeline_json_provider_facing_stopless_round_two_uses_incremented_repeat_count --lib -- --nocapture`
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi stopless_engine_substeps_keep_reasoning_stop_pair_until_format_build --lib -- --nocapture`
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi request_codec_prefers_live_stopless_tools_over_stale_embedded_context --lib -- --nocapture`
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi test_req_process_preserves_stopless_restored_pair_inside_input_for_round_two --lib -- --nocapture`
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi stopless_governed_request_builds_anthropic_wire_with_reasoning_stop_pair --lib -- --nocapture`
  - `PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH node --experimental-vm-modules ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js tests/servertool/stopless-cli-continuation.spec.ts --runInBand`
- 当前状态：focused gates 已绿；下一步需要按真实 provider/client 双端继续在线样本验证，确认 live `/v1/responses` second-round provider-facing 请求也不再退化成纯 guidance 文本。

# 2026-06-27 stopless terminal output_text stale-meta fix

- 在线黑盒复现：第三轮 stopless budget terminal 后，nested `output[0].content[0].text` 已是 `stopless budget exhausted`，但 Responses 顶层 `output_text` 仍是 provider 原文 `继续执行中`。
- 切段结论：
  - `runStoplessAutoHandlerRuntimeJson` 直接 NAPI probe 输出正确，`handlerResult.chatResponse.output_text` 和 nested output 都是 `stopless budget exhausted`。
  - 根因在 Rust Responses client semantic builder：`build_responses_payload_from_chat_core` 优先信任 `__responses_output_text_meta`，而该 meta 来自 provider 原始 `output_text`；chatprocess 已替换 message content 后，旧 meta 仍覆盖顶层 `output_text`。
- 修复：
  - `servertool-core/src/stop_visible_text.rs` 去掉 chat/responses visible surface 的 `||` 短路，确保 replace/prefix/ensure 同时更新 chat choices 与 Responses output/output_text。
  - `router-hotpath-napi/.../responses_payload.rs` 新增 `collect_output_text_parts`；当 finalized content 与 `__responses_output_text_meta` 冲突且 content 非空时，以当前 finalized content 为准。
- 新增/扩展测试：
  - `replace_updates_chat_and_responses_visible_surfaces_without_short_circuit`
  - `budget_exhausted_followup_path_replaces_provider_text_with_terminal_summary`
  - `build_responses_payload_prefers_finalized_content_over_stale_output_text_meta`
- 验证已过：
  - `cargo test -p servertool-core replace_updates_chat_and_responses_visible_surfaces_without_short_circuit --lib -- --nocapture`
  - `cargo test -p servertool-core budget_exhausted_followup_path_replaces_provider_text_with_terminal_summary --lib -- --nocapture`
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi build_responses_payload_prefers_finalized_content_over_stale_output_text_meta --lib -- --nocapture`
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi stopless_auto_handler_bridge --lib -- --nocapture`
  - `node sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/build-native-hotpath.mjs`
  - `npx tsc -p sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/tsconfig.json --pretty false`
  - `npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false`
  - `node --experimental-vm-modules ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js tests/servertool/stopless-cli-continuation.spec.ts --runInBand`
  - `npm run verify:servertool-rust-only`
  - `npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate`
  - 在线 `node scripts/tests/stopless-followup-blackbox.mjs` 通过：3 次 upstream，首轮 CLI reasoningStop，第二轮 `repeatCount=2`，第三轮 `finish_reason=stop` 且 terminal body 报告 `stopless budget exhausted`。

# 2026-06-28 stopless conditional schema closeout slice

- 黑盒证据：`npm run verify:stopless-invalid-schema-blackbox` 通过，missingFields 按轮收敛 `["has_evidence","next_step"] -> ["next_step"]`，第三轮完整 tagged terminal schema 正常终止且不走 budget exhausted。

- 最终 gate 证据：`npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate`、`npm run verify:servertool-rust-only`、`npm run verify:architecture-wiki-sync` 均通过。
- 追加在线证据：2026-06-28 09:11 CST 用 `routecodex restart --port 5555` 把 5555 daemon 从 `0.90.3275` 更新到 `0.90.3276`，`curl /health` 返回 `ready=true/pipelineReady=true/version=0.90.3276`。随后 `STOPLESS_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5555 STOPLESS_ATTEMPTS=3 STOPLESS_OUTPUT=/tmp/stopless-5555-live-probe-after-conditional-schema.json node scripts/tests/stopless-5555-live-probe.mjs` 通过：首轮 `requires_action exec_command repeatCount=1`，第一次 submit 后 `requires_action exec_command repeatCount=2`，第二次 submit 后 `completed output_text="stopless budget exhausted"`，无 raw `reasoningStop`/schema 泄漏。

# 2026-06-28 Responses continuation / SSE immutable interval audit

- 审计目标按 Jason 新边界重判：`/v1/responses` continuation 只负责 `HubRespChatProcess03Governed exit -> save canonical truth -> immutable store interval -> restore canonical truth -> HubReqChatProcess03Governed entry`。保存后到恢复前不得转换、清理、裁剪、重排、补偿或推导 request/response history；控制语义必须在 MetadataCenter，不得写入 request/response payload/history。
- 已读真源：`.agents/skills/rcc-dev-skills/references/25-protocol-sse-continuation-boundary.md`、`docs/architecture/wiki/responses-continuation-mainline-source.md`、`docs/architecture/function-map.yml`、`docs/architecture/verification-map.yml`。本轮只审计和记录，不改运行时代码。
- 明确风险 1：`hub_pipeline_blocks/router_metadata_input.rs` 的 `build_router_metadata_input` 仍从 `metadataCenterSnapshot.runtimeControl`、`requestSemantics.continuation`、`responsesResume` 多路回读同类控制语义。证据：`providerProtocol` 只从 snapshot 读是正确方向，但 `routeHint` 同时读 snapshot/continuation/responsesResume（约 L134-L154），`sessionId/conversationId` 同时读 requestTruth/continuation/responsesResume（约 L164-L207），`retryProviderKey` 同时读 runtimeControl/continuation.providerKey/responsesResume.providerKey（约 L231-L265）。风险：route metadata owner 虽在 Rust，但控制真源仍不唯一，`responsesResume` 可继续携带 route/provider/session 语义，和 MetadataCenter 唯一控制面冲突。建议首包：补红测禁止非 allowlist 的 continuation/responsesResume route/provider/session 回读；再把允许项收窄为 `metadataCenterSnapshot.runtimeControl + requestTruth + continuationContext`。
- 明确风险 2：`responses-request-bridge.ts` 的 `buildResponsesPipelineMetadataForHttp` 仍把 `responsesResume` 展开到 flat metadata（约 L121-L130）并写入 `continuation_context.responsesResume`（约 L152-L163）。`sanitizeResponsesResumeForContinuationContextForHttp` 只删 session/conversation（约 L168-L176），但未限制 `fullInput/restoredTools/toolOutputsDetailed/providerKey/routeHint` 等数据面/控制面混入。风险：MetadataCenter continuationContext 可能承载 full input/history/tools 这类数据面对象，违反“control plane only”。建议首包：把 `responsesResume` slot schema 收窄为 owner/id/scope/control keys，`fullInput/restoredTools/toolOutputsDetailed` 改为 canonical store return 或 Chat Process-local restore input，不允许进入 MetadataCenter snapshot。
- 明确风险 3：`responses-request-bridge.ts` 的 `buildResponsesRequestContextForHttp` 在 bridge 层根据 `resumeMeta.fullInput/restoredTools` 重建 relay resume payload（约 L517-L540 及后续分支），并调用 `captureReqInboundResponsesContextSnapshot` 生成 normalized payload/context（约 L467-L503）。风险：这已经不只是“传 MetadataCenter 绑定和 native input”，而是在 TS bridge 做 request restore payload 拼装；按新边界，restore 应归 Chat Process continuation owner，req_inbound/bridge 只能捕获 explicit evidence 和 opaque native input。建议首包：先 gate 禁止 bridge 读取 `fullInput/restoredTools` 组装 payload；将该组装迁回 Rust continuation restore entry。
- 高风险待拆 4：Rust `shared_responses_conversation_utils.rs` 中 save 前 `prepare_responses_conversation_entry` 做 `normalize_responses_history_items` + `collapse_auto_stop_hook_pairs_in_history`（约 L1352-L1368），这可解释为 canonical save 定型；但 `resume_responses_conversation_payload` / `restore_responses_continuation_payload` / `materialize_responses_continuation_payload` 在 restore/materialize 时再次 `normalize_responses_history_items`、`collapse_auto_stop_hook_pairs_in_history`、`strip_leading_pending_function_call_replay`、`collapse_duplicate_pending_tool_batch_replay` 并合并 incoming/prefix/fullInput（约 L1427-L1449、L1967-L2055、L2074-L2215）。风险：如果这些动作改变已保存 truth 或 incoming current request history，就落入 save/restore immutable interval 的禁止区。建议首包：把 restore/materialize 分成两类函数并加红测：`canonical_restore_no_mutation` 只能按保存 truth + 当前显式 tool output 组装，不做清理/折叠；需要治理的 stopless/tool rewrite 移到 `ChatProcReqContinuation04HookRestored` 之后。
- 明确风险 5：`responses-response-bridge.ts` 仍保留 response/SSE projection 补形：`planResponsesContinuationCloseActionForHttp` 根据 response body probe 判断 persist/clear（约 L254-L288），`prepareResponsesJsonBodyForSseBridgeForHttp` 可把 chat.completion 转 Responses payload（约 L475-L502），`normalizeResponsesJsonBodyForHttp` 也能在 response bridge 做 chat->responses 转换（约 L505-L529），`ensureResponsesJsonToSseRequiredFieldsForHttp` 从 requestContext 回填 `model`（约 L570-L599）。风险：按新边界，resp_outbound/SSE 只能投影已 final 的 semantic response，不能准备下一轮 continuation truth 或用 requestContext 修 client response body。建议首包：将 chat->responses/client payload projection 锁到 Rust `HubRespOutbound04ClientSemantic`，TS bridge 只调用 native projection；保留 transport error payload 可以，但不能决策 continuation persist/clear。
- 明确风险 6：`handler-response-sse.ts` 虽大体是 transport，但仍读取 `result.continuationOwner` 决定 direct/relay、drop frame、client close/closeout 路径（约 L543-L544、L725-L727）。按当前 function-map，SSE transport 可看 opaque handoff state，但不能成为 continuation owner 判定者。建议首包：保留只读 handoff flag，但加 gate 禁止 handler/SSE 读取 `required_action/finish_reason/response body` 做 owner/persist/repair；continuation closeout 决策必须在 Chat Process/response bridge native plan 前完成。
- 关联验证尝试：`npm run verify:stopless-contract-blackbox` 本轮未能作为 continuation 结论使用，失败在 `hub_pipeline_missing_preselected_route`，说明当前测试环境/fixtures 仍未提供 `metadata.runtime_control.preselectedRoute`，不是本轮 continuation 审计的直接证据。
- 第一批建议修复包（待 Jason 审批）：A) 先补静态红测/gate，禁止 TS request bridge 读取 `fullInput/restoredTools` 组装 payload、禁止 MetadataCenter `responsesResume` 携带 data-plane keys、禁止 response bridge/SSE 做 chat->responses 业务转换或 continuation persist/clear probe；B) Rust route metadata 去掉非 allowlist 的 continuation/responsesResume route/provider/session 回读；C) Rust continuation restore/materialize 拆出 no-mutation contract，stopless/tool rewrite 后移到 request Chat Process hook restore；D) 修复 stopless blackbox fixture 的 preselectedRoute 输入，再跑 focused gates。

- 未过/未统一：`tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/request-executor-provider-send-failure.abort.spec.ts` 仍按旧 SSE decode retry/blocking recoverable 字段断言失败（note.md 既有缺口）；`src/utils/errorsamples.ts`、`scripts/lib/errorsamples.mjs` 与 `src/debug/snapshot/provider-errorsample.ts` 仍是分散 errorsample writer/root；provider error summary、server request log、usage inline `diag=`、OAuth/process lifecycle logger 仍未全部纳入 debug logger registry；policy violation 当前只有 reader/report surface，写面/目录文档仍未完全统一；`src/debug/README.md` 仍是旧目录结构。

# 2026-06-28 Responses continuation / SSE first closeout implementation

- 本轮按 Jason 的 immutable interval 边界继续实现第一修复包：`/v1/responses` continuation 只作为 save/restore 边界，TS bridge / SSE / HTTP server 不再从 response body 或 request continuation residue 推导 route/provider/continuation closeout 语义。
- 已物理删除 response bridge 旧 owner：`responses-response-bridge.ts` 移除 `planResponsesContinuationCloseActionForHttp`、`isDirectResponsesToolCallContinuationForHttp` 和 `isToolCallContinuationResponseNative` probe 依赖；`bridge.ts` / `bridge/index.ts` 及对应 `.js/.d.ts` 不再 re-export 旧 closeout surface。`responses-response-bridge` 只保留 response projection / clear error helper，不再根据 response body 决定 persist/clear。
- HTTP server direct path 收口：`persistOrClearResponsesDirectContinuation` 不再调用 response-body probe 决定 close action；direct responses 成功对象只 `recordResponsesResponseForRequest`，再以 `keepForSubmitToolOutputs=false` 做 retention finalize。后续若需要 `keepForSubmitToolOutputs=true`，必须来自 Rust Chat Process runtime effect，而不是 server handler/bridge 扫 body。
- Router metadata 测试同步：`tests/sharedmodule/hub-pipeline-router-metadata.spec.ts` 把 relay continuation residue 改为 nested `continuation` 保留，不提升 `routeHint/sessionId/conversationId` 到 top-level；top-level route/session/provider truth 只允许来自 `metadataCenterSnapshot.runtimeControl/requestTruth`。
- 已验证通过：`npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/modules/llmswitch/bridge/responses-request-bridge.metadata-center.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/hub-pipeline-router-metadata.spec.ts --runInBand`（2 suites / 11 tests passed）；`cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi metadata --lib -- --nocapture` 在 `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core` 下通过（118 passed）；`npm run verify:route-metadata-preselected-route-owner`、`npm run verify:responses-sse-business-module`、`npm run verify:responses-handler-single-bridge-surface` 均通过。
- 当前验证缺口：`npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` 仍失败，但失败集中在未改动的 `src/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.ts`，原因是 `./provider-traffic-governor.js` 缺失及相关参数隐式 any；这是当前 dirty worktree 的既有残余，不是本轮 continuation closeout 引入。测试 mock 中仍有旧 `planResponsesContinuationCloseActionForHttp` 字符串，当前不影响源码 gate，后续跑到相关旧单测时需按新边界清 mock，禁止恢复旧 runtime symbol。

# 2026-06-28 metadata-center mtc-06 restore slice
