# 2026-06-28 Responses continuation restore/materialize no-mutation slice

- 本轮继续 Jason 的 continuation immutable interval 收口，目标缩小到 Rust `shared_responses_conversation_utils.rs` 的 `restore_responses_continuation_payload` / `materialize_responses_continuation_payload`：允许用 normalized shadow 做 prefix/overlap/合法性判定，但输出 `payload.input` 与 `meta.fullInput` 必须来自原始保存 truth + 当前 incoming truth，不能在 restore/materialize 中再次 normalize/strip/collapse。
- 已补红测：`restore_preserves_current_delta_without_history_normalization` 锁住 restore 不得把当前 delta function_call 重建成瘦身 DTO；`materialize_preserves_saved_prefix_and_current_delta_without_history_normalization` 锁住 materialize 不得改写 saved prefix 或 current delta。红测初跑失败，失败点为旧实现丢失 `x_current_request_truth` / `x_saved_store_truth` 扩展字段。
- 已修实现：新增 `raw_suffix_for_normalized_delta`，用 normalized copy 计算 delta 起点，但从 raw incoming 切片输出；restore 的 `payload.input` 改为 raw delta，`meta.fullInput` 改为 raw incoming full input；materialize 的 full input 改为 raw persisted prefix + raw current delta。旧 `strip_leading_pending_function_call_replay` / `collapse_duplicate_pending_tool_batch_replay` 已无调用并物理删除，避免 restore/materialize 清理历史语义复活。
- 已验证通过：`cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi history_normalization --lib -- --nocapture`（2 passed）；`cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi restore --lib -- --nocapture`（24 passed）；`cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi shared_responses_conversation_utils --lib -- --nocapture`（39 passed）。
- 提交注意：`shared_responses_conversation_utils.rs` 同文件存在此前 stopless guidance dirty hunk，本轮 no-mutation slice 已用 hunk 级暂存隔离；未验证 stopless hunk 不应混入本切片。

# 2026-06-28 responses 502精确修复观察

- 现场 502 不是单点：
  - `recordResponse` 走了 provider-enhanced requestLabel，导致 `responses-conversation-store.recordResponse` 找不到 request context，报 `missing_request_context` / `MALFORMED_RESPONSE`。
  - provider retry 场景里 `preselectedRoute` 被 attempt>1 单次释放后，Rust HubPipeline bootstrapped VR 仍要求 `metadata.runtime_control.preselectedRoute`，报 `hub_pipeline_missing_preselected_route`。
- 当前修复边界：
  - 请求��值必须写入 `MetadataCenter.requestTruth.requestId`，response save 只认 canonical requestId。
  - 只有在 `excludedProviderKeys` 明确非空时，才允许走 Rust 的精确 retry route；没有该条件仍然 fail-fast，不做 fallback。
- 风险提示：
  - 不能把“retry route”写成宽泛兜底；必须保留 preselectedRoute 缺失的 fail-fast 语义，只放行精确 provider retry case。

# 2026-06-28 error-handling review

- 发现：`provider-direct` 错误链仍是“计算统一 failure plan 但原样抛回”。`src/server/runtime/http-server/provider-direct-pipeline.ts` catch 中先调用 `onProviderError`，随后 `throw error`；`src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts` 的 `onProviderError` 里 `decideDirectProviderRetry(...)` 返回值被 `void` 丢弃，无法驱动 reroute/继续执行。
- 发现：`direct-decision.ts` 明确写着 `decideDirectProviderRetry` 永远 `rethrowDecision`，这与 “provider 错误不应直接客户端可见，除非候选池和 default 池同时为空” 冲突。
- 发现：当前错误动作队列实现为 `1s -> 2s -> 3s` 循环，TTL 10 分钟；若目标为 Jason 口头确认的 `1s -> 3s -> 5s` + 连续 3 次错误冷却 30 分钟，当前实现和文档存在不一致，需要独立收口。

- Rust NAPI helper 收口：`resolve_virtual_router_routing_state_key_json`、`resolve_virtual_router_stop_message_scope_json`、`get_stop_message_state`、`get_pre_command_state` 都优先读取 `metadataCenterSnapshot`，支持外层 metadata carrier 只作为控制信号容器；新增 `metadata_center_snapshot_input_tests` 锁住 snapshot 优先。

# 2026-06-29 responses continuation request-context capture

- 用户纠偏：运行时恢复只能依赖 MetadataCenter 控制语义和当前原始 client request；`__metadataCenter` / `__rt` / sample internals / payload metadata copies 只能作证据，不得作为 runtime repair truth。
- live replay `req_1782717586089_19645bbc` 仍复现 `record.missing_request_context`：provider 出站 body 无 metadata 泄漏；response save 用 canonical `openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260629T151946089-420659-942` 记录，但 store 未命中当前 requestId。
- 当前修复方向：入口 request context capture 必须 fail-fast，禁止 non-blocking 吞错后继续 provider pipeline；bridge runtime helpers 必须优先写同一进程全局 authoritative `responsesConversationStore`，避免 capture/record/resume 落到不同 store 实例。
- 验证结果：clean worktree 套本 slice 后 focused handler/runtime tests、TS typecheck、function/mainline gates、`build:base`、global install/restart 到 `0.90.3301` 通过；重新 replay 原始样本 `req_1782715751293_ce9671f1` 时不再出现新的 `record.missing_request_context`。
- 新 blocker：同一 replay 仍 HTTP 502，原因变为 provider/reroute 层：orangeai 429、XLC 504，随后 retry 到 MiniMax 触发 `MetadataCenter runtime_control.providerProtocol conflict: existing=openai-chat selected=anthropic-messages`，最终 `hub_pipeline_virtual_router_retry_route_failed`。这不是当前 request-context capture slice 的闭环通过，需独立追 providerProtocol retry control owner。

# 2026-06-29 providerProtocol reroute conflict investigation
- 用户纠偏：semantic context/continuation capture 只能在 Chat Process 请求入口 restore 与响应出口 save；handler/bridge 请求前/响应后只能归一、投影、传输、scope 校验/释放。已撤掉 handler-level context-capture 修法与测试，不提交。
- live blocker：5555 provider reroute 从 openai-chat provider 切到 anthropic-messages MiniMax 时，request-executor helper 把 MetadataCenter runtime_control.providerProtocol 当 write-once，报 existing=openai-chat selected=anthropic-messages。合同真相是 runtime_control replaceable_by_owner_only；同 request-route owner 的新 attempt 应允许替换，非 owner 预写冲突仍 fail-fast。

# 2026-06-29 responses request-context capture owner correction
- live 5555 在 providerProtocol owner 修正后继续暴露 `record.missing_request_context`：XLC 成功返回 response id，但 `resp_chatprocess` 出口 save 用 canonical requestId 找不到 store entry。证据显示 handler capture 是 non-blocking 且位于 Chat Process 外，违反用户纠偏的 owner 边界。
- 修正方向：删除 handler/bridge 的 `captureResponsesPipelineRequestContextForHttp` 死入口；request-executor 在 Rust HubPipeline 产出 `contextSnapshot` 后、provider send 前执行唯一 store capture，capture 只用当前 pipeline body、Chat Process contextSnapshot、MetadataCenter request truth/scope，失败直接 fail-fast。
- 同步修正 bridge runtime integrations：capture/record/resume/lookup/rebind/clear/finalize/scope restore 优先同进程全局 `__rccResponsesConversationStore`，避免请求 capture 与响应 record 落到不同 core module 实例。

# 2026-06-29 servertool auto-hook queue sourceIndex Rust plan slice

- 本轮继续清理 servertool TS 残留，目标文件：`sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/orchestration-blocks.ts`。
- 根因：`buildAutoHookQueuesFromConfig` 虽已调用 Rust queue planner，但仍用 TS `normalizeServerToolCallName()` 对 hook id 做 trim/lowercase/websearch alias，并用 normalized id map 把 Rust plan 回映射到原 hook；这是重复业务语义。
- 改动：Rust `plan_servertool_auto_hook_queues_json` 在每个 plan entry 输出 `sourceIndex`；TS native parser 保留该字段；`orchestration-blocks.ts` 删除 `normalizeServerToolCallName`，只按 Rust plan 的 `sourceIndex` 回映射原 hook 对象。
- Gate 防复活：`server-side-tools.auto-hook-config.spec.ts` 和 `verify-servertool-rust-only.mjs` 禁止 `function normalizeServerToolCallName(` / `.trim().toLowerCase()` 在 orchestration blocks 复活，并要求 `sourceIndex` 回映射。
- 红测证据：先跑 focused Jest，`auto hook queue shell does not own hook id normalization` 因缺 `sourceIndex` 且 TS normalize 存在而红；实现后转绿。
- 验证已过：`cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi test_plan_servertool_auto_hook_queues --lib -- --nocapture`；`node sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/build-native-hotpath.mjs`；focused Jest `server-side-tools.auto-hook-config.spec.ts` + `servertool-active-orchestration-audit.spec.ts`；sharedmodule/root `tsc`；`npm run verify:servertool-rust-only`；`npm run verify:architecture-thin-wrapper-only`；`npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate`；scoped `git diff --check`。
- 范围声明：本 slice 只关闭 auto-hook queue 回映射中的 TS name normalization；servertool 全 Rust-only 仍需继续清理剩余 TS shell/IO 边界。

# 2026-06-29 servertool entry context filter Rust owner slice

- 本轮继续清理 servertool TS 残留，目标文件：`sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/entry-context-shell.ts`。

# 2026-06-29 servertool registry projection sourceIndex slice

# 2026-06-30 4444 default-pool planner fix

- 目标：修复 4444 `/v1/responses` 在当前 route pool 排空时直接把 `PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE` 投给客户端的问题；default route 应作为 routing group 级兜底池供任意目标兜底。
- 根因：host 侧 `extractRoutingTiersForRoutingGroupRoute()` 只返回当前 route tiers，未把同 routing group 的 `routing.default` 暴露给 Rust `plan_primary_exhausted_to_default_pool`；同时 primary-exhausted catch 分支优先读旧 `lastError/retryState.lastError`，可能拿上一轮 provider error 覆盖当前 VR error 的 `primaryExhaustedRouteName/Targets`。
- 修复：`extractRoutingTiersForRoutingGroupRoute()` 对非 `default` route 追加 `routing.default` tiers 并标记 `backup: true`，仍保留原始 targets、不展开 forwarder；request-executor/router-direct primary-exhausted 分支只读/抛当前 VR error。
- 验证：focused Jest `http-server-bootstrap.routing-policy-group` + `request-executor-primary-exhausted-plan` 14/14 PASS；request-executor default-pool focused PASS；`tsc` PASS；`verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS；`verify:architecture-mainline-call-map` PASS；`build:base` PASS；全局安装 `routecodex --version == 0.90.3314`；`routecodex restart --port 4444` 后 `/health` ready；live `/v1/responses` probe 返回 `response.completed` 文本 `4444 default pool probe ok`。
- 回放证据：用当前 `~/.rcc/config.toml` 内存模拟旧失败形态（4444 tools 只剩 `fwd.gpt.gpt-5.3-codex-spark`，default 保留 M3）调用 compiled extractor + Rust native planner，返回 `status=default_pool`、`defaultPoolTargets=["fwd.minimax.MiniMax-M3"]`、`fromTierId=gateway-glm-4444-default`。

- 目标：继续清理 servertool TS 残留，删除 `registry-projection-shell.ts` 中的 TS name normalization / mismatch 判定；registry projection 只消费 Rust native `sourceIndex` 回映射。
- 改动：Rust `ServertoolRegistryAutoHookDescriptorPlan` 增加 `sourceIndex`；native wrapper 校验并返回 `sourceIndex`；TS `projectAutoServerToolHookDescriptors` / `projectRegistrySources` 删除 `canonicalName()`、`.trim().toLowerCase()` 和 name/trigger mismatch 二次校验，只按 native source index 回映射并 fail-fast 缺 index。
- Gate 防复活：`registry-projection-shell.spec.ts`、`servertool-active-orchestration-audit.spec.ts`、`verify-servertool-rust-only.mjs` 禁止 `function canonicalName(`、`.trim().toLowerCase()`、`native registry source projection mismatch` 在 registry projection shell 复活。
- 已验证：`cargo test -p servertool-core registry_contract --lib -- --nocapture` PASS；`cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi plans_servertool_registry_actions_via_servertool_core_bridge --lib -- --nocapture` PASS；`node sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/build-native-hotpath.mjs` PASS；focused Jest `registry-projection-shell.spec.ts` + `server-side-tools.auto-hook-config.spec.ts` + `server-side-tools.failfast.spec.ts` + `servertool-active-orchestration-audit.spec.ts` 4 suites / 46 tests PASS；sharedmodule/root `tsc` PASS；`npm run verify:servertool-rust-only` PASS；scoped `git diff --check` PASS。

# 2026-06-30 VR context spillover online validation

- 结论：VR selection 应按当前请求 `estimated_tokens` 与候选目标 `maxContextTokens` 过滤目标；非 longcontext route 若所有候选均 context overflow 且存在 longcontext route，应跳到 longcontext，而不是继续命中小窗模型。
- 旧失败样本：`openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260630T000924944-424471-4754`，503KB input 曾命中 `search/gateway-glm-4444-priority-search -> ykk.gpt-5.3-codex-spark`，导致上游 `context_too_large`。
- 在线复测：marker `vr-context-spillover-1782751104`，新请求 `openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260630T003824343-424478-4761` 命中 `longcontext/gateway-glm-4444-priority-longcontext -> ykk.gpt-5.4-mini`；client SSE 收到 `response.completed`。
- provider body 隔离：对应 router/provider request 的 `body.model == gpt-5.4-mini`，`bodyBytes == 530797`，`inputBytes == 503525`，`metadata` / `__metadataCenter` 均未出现在 provider body。
- 剩余诊断缺口：log `reason` 仍显示原分类原因 `search:last-tool-search`，虽然 `route_used` 已是 longcontext；后续应把 spillover reason 显式标记为 context spillover，避免误读。
- 诊断缺口已修：`SelectionResult.reasoning_tag` 追加 `context:overflow-spillover`，route decision/diagnostics 统一追加该 tag。白盒验证：`cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi non_longcontext_route_spills_to_longcontext_when_targets_overflow_context --lib -- --nocapture` PASS；`cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi route_reasoning_marks_context_spillover_to_longcontext --lib -- --nocapture` PASS；整组 `virtual_router_engine::engine::selection` 33 tests PASS，`virtual_router_engine::engine::route` 9 tests PASS。
- 诊断修复在线复测：全局 `routecodex --version == 0.90.3312`，4444 health ready；marker `vr-context-spillover-reason-1782778634`，请求 `openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260630T081714994-424619-4902` 命中 `longcontext/gateway-glm-4444-priority-longcontext -> ykk.gpt-5.4-mini reason=search:last-tool-search|context:overflow-spillover`；client SSE 收到 `response.completed`；provider `.body.model == gpt-5.4-mini`，`.body` 无 `metadata` / `__metadataCenter`。

# 2026-06-30 provider wire metadata allowlist fix

- 目标：修复 10000 `/v1/chat/completions` 样本 `openai-chat-unknown-unknown-20260629T223457453-424045-4328` 暴露的 provider wire 内部 metadata 泄漏；不能把带内部字段的请求发给上游后再归因上游。
- 样本证据：旧样本第一跳 `provider-request.json` 不含 `__metadataCenter`，第二跳 `provider-request_1.json` 含 `__metadataCenter.providerObservation.clientModelId/assignedModelId`；错误堆栈落在 `VercelAiSdkOpenAiTransport.executePreparedRequest -> HttpRequestExecutor.executeHttpRequestOnce -> executeRouterDirectPipeline`，状态为 `502 ECONNRESET provider.send`。
- 修复：`MetadataCenter.bind/attach` 的 JS mirror `__metadataCenter` 改为 non-enumerable，避免对象展开/JSON 发送；OpenAI SDK provider options builder 与 Anthropic provider wire executor 同时 fail-fast 拒绝 `metadata` / `__metadataCenter`，形成 provider wire allowlist 守门。
- 已验证：focused Jest `vercel-ai-sdk-openai-transport.spec.ts` + `vercel-ai-sdk-anthropic-transport.spec.ts` + `metadata-center-dualwrite.spec.ts` PASS；root `tsc --noEmit` PASS；`npm run build:base` PASS；`routecodex restart --port 10000` + `/health` ready version `0.90.3311`。
- 在线复测：新样本 `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-chat/ports/10000/req_1782777285968_648ee193/` provider `minimax.key1.MiniMax-M3` 返回 200；`provider-request.json` 和 `provider-request_1.json` body keys 均只有业务字段，`has __metadataCenter false`。

# 2026-06-30 internal error numbering completion audit

- 目标：完成 `debug.internal_error_numbering`，内部 RouteCodex debug 错误固定到 `500-1xx/2xx/3xx`，外部/provider/upstream/client 错误只用 `ExternalErrorLink` 关联，不包成 `InternalDebugErrorEnvelope`。
- 当前实现真源：`src/debug/internal-error/**` 是 registry/envelope/external-link/projection/guards/log-fields 唯一 owner；`src/debug/diag/error-artifact.ts` 只接收 `internalError?: InternalDebugErrorEnvelope` 和 `externalError?: ExternalErrorLink`，不改变 public ErrorErr06 projection。
- 主线资产：`internal_error_numbering.mainline` 已接入 function-map、verification-map、mainline-call-map、mainline manifests、wiki markdown/html、binding budget；manifest 显示 6 条边 anchored、0 pending。
- 日志语义：RouteCodex-owned VR retry route failure 会打印 `internalCode=500-130`；外部 transport/provider `ECONNRESET/fetch failed` 只打印 `source=external_transport reason="fetch failed"`，不会打印 `internalCode`。
- curl/解析证据：`xlapis.com` 本机解析为 `198.18.166.141`，`api2.orangeai.cc` 本机解析为 `198.18.208.231`；公共 DNS 对比曾返回 `xlapis.com -> 45.207.219.165`、`api2.orangeai.cc -> 45.197.148.32`。`198.18.0.0/15` 属保留测试网段，说明当时 `fetch failed/ECONNRESET` 的首要根因是本机 DNS/代理路径异常，不是 RouteCodex 内部 `500-*` 错误。
- 验证：focused Jest `tests/debug/internal-error-numbering*.spec.ts` + `tests/architecture/internal-error-numbering-mainline.spec.ts` PASS；日志 focused Jest `request-error-log.spec.ts` + `request-executor-runtime-blocks.spec.ts` PASS；`node scripts/architecture/verify-internal-error-numbering.mjs` PASS；`verify:debug-unified-surface` PASS；`verify:error-pipeline-contract` PASS；`verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS；`verify:architecture-mainline-call-map` PASS；`verify:architecture-mainline-manifest-sync` PASS；`verify:architecture-mainline-node-id-consistency` PASS；`npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false` PASS；`npm run build:base` PASS；`git diff --check` EXIT=0。
- Runtime：全局 `routecodex --version` 与 `node dist/cli.js --version` 均为 `0.90.3313`；执行 `routecodex restart --port 10000`、`routecodex restart --port 5555` 后，两个 `/health` 均返回 ready/pipelineReady true、version `0.90.3313`。
- 样本回放：build 后 JS 最小回放证明内部 `500-100` envelope 可投影到 debug artifact，并可附 transport external link；纯 provider external record `externalHasInternal=false`；client/provider normal payload leak guards 通过。
- 剩余风险：未再运行会弹浏览器的 `verify:architecture-wiki-browser-smoke`；当前已用 wiki/html sync 与 manifest/mainline gates 覆盖文本和渲染产物一致性。
- 全局安装后复测：`routecodex --version == 0.90.3312`，`10000/5520/5555` health ready；新样本 `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-chat/ports/10000/req_1782778804787_45cbed3f/` provider `minimax.key1.MiniMax-M3` 返回 200，两个 provider request 均无 `metadata` / `__metadataCenter`。

# 2026-06-30 4444 PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE runtime config fix

- 现象：`http://127.0.0.1:4444/v1/responses` 返回 SSE error `status=502 code=PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE`，用户样本 request `openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260630T082343839-424714-4997`。
- 根因证据：`~/.rcc/logs/server-4444.log` 08:23:16 起 4444 tools route 先命中 `cc.key1.gpt-5.3-codex-spark` 并 `fetch failed`，再命中 `ykk.gpt-5.3-codex-spark` 并返回 HTTP 503 `system_memory_overloaded`；随后 `082318563` 到 `082343839` 连续请求在路由阶段直接 `No available providers after applying routing instructions`。
- 配置根因：`~/.rcc/config.toml` 的 `gateway_glm_4444` tools/search/web_search/multimodal/default targets 只有 `["fwd.gpt.gpt-5.3-codex-spark"]`，而 10000/5555 同类 tools/search 有 `fwd.minimax.MiniMax-M3` 兜底；Spark 小池被排空后 4444 没有 M3/default 兜底。
- 修复：把 4444 tools/search/web_search/multimodal/default targets 改为 `["fwd.gpt.gpt-5.3-codex-spark", "fwd.minimax.MiniMax-M3"]`，保留 Spark 优先，M3 只作为后续目标。
- 验证：`routecodex config validate` PASS；`routecodex restart --port 4444` 后 `127.0.0.1:4444/health` ready version `0.90.3313`；真实 `/v1/responses` probe 返回 `response.completed` 与文本 `4444 fallback probe ok`。后续日志显示 4444 tools/search 请求不再直接 `PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE`，`cc fetch failed` 后会继续尝试后续 target。

# 2026-06-30 provider-response streamPipe created/stopMessage action closeout

- 目标：继续 provider-response SSE slice，修复 native rebuild 后 `tests/sharedmodule/provider-response-rust-plan.spec.ts` 的流式红点：Responses stream 缺 `created_at`、OpenAI chat stream 缺 `created`、普通 stop 响应误触 servertool action 后覆盖 Rust stream payload。
- 根因：
  - Rust `build_responses_payload_from_chat_core` 对已有 `object:"response"` payload early-return 时保留了 `created_at:0`，Responses SSE codec 正确 fail-fast。
  - Rust `plan_resp_chatprocess_03_servertool_runtime_actions` 在 `stopMessageEnabled:false` 的普通 `finish_reason:"stop"` 响应上仍规划 `servertoolRuntimeAction`，TS IO shell 可能执行并把 action payload 当 post-governance payload 投影，覆盖 `streamPipe.payload.created`。
  - TS `executeProviderResponseNativeServertoolEffects` 只要存在 execution plan 就 post-project，即使 orchestration 未真正执行也会改变 payload。
- 修复：
  - Rust Responses projection owner 只接受正数 `created_at/created`，缺失或 `0` 时在 Rust 内补当前秒级时间。
  - Rust response stream planning 只有 metadata / `__rt` 明确启用 stopMessage 或 `runtimeControl.stopless.active` 时才规划 `servertoolRuntimeAction`。
  - TS provider-response IO shell 只在 orchestration 实际 executed 后做 post-servertool client projection；未执行 action 不再改写 payload。
  - provider-response focused Jest 的 native plan 断言改成关键字段匹配，避免把 Rust 新增 `created` 和 runtime effect shape 误判为失败。
- 验证：
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi build_responses_payload_from_chat_core_supplies_created_at_for_existing_response_payload --lib -- --nocapture` PASS。
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi normalize_openai_chat_reasoning_outbound --lib -- --nocapture` PASS。
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi response_stream_path_returns_stream_pipe_effect_plan --lib -- --nocapture` PASS，反向锁住普通 stream 不生成 servertool action。
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi response_stream_stop_with_runtime_callbacks_returns_stream_and_servertool_effects --lib -- --nocapture` PASS，正向锁住启用 stopMessage 时仍生成 servertool action。
  - `node sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/build-native-hotpath.mjs` PASS。
  - `node --experimental-vm-modules ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js tests/sharedmodule/provider-response-rust-plan.spec.ts --runInBand` PASS，20/20。
  - `npx tsc -p sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/tsconfig.json --pretty false` PASS。
  - `npm run verify:hub-response-provider-sse-materialization` PASS。
  - `npm run verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS。
  - `npm run verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS。
  - `git diff --check` PASS。
- 已知无关红：整份 `tests/sharedmodule/hub-pipeline-stage-residue-audit.spec.ts` 仍因缺失 `scripts/tests/virtual-router-quota-health-restore.mjs` 失败；本轮相关 provider-response/servertool SSE projection residue cases 均通过。
# 2026-06-30 总纲收口

- 已新增 `docs/agent-routing/05-foundation-contract.md`，把默认完成合同统一成：`red/failing sample -> unique owner fix -> build/install -> restart -> health/smoke -> old-sample replay -> full gate`。
- `docs/agent-routing/00-entry-routing.md` 现在先读总纲再分流，路由只负责“去哪儿”，不再定义“做完”。
- `AGENTS.md` 标准执行顺序已改成先读总纲合同，再选路由。
- `coding-principals`、`feature-dev`、`dev-flow` 已补同一条闭环，避免 agent 在 `build/install/health` 处误停。
- 验证：`sed` 回读通过，`git diff --check` 通过。

# 2026-06-30 audit: 为什么 agent 停在 build/health，不走全闭环

- `AGENTS.md` 有“先验证后结论 / 必须在线验证 / 必须重放真实样本”，但它是原则级，不是固定完成序列。
- `coding-principals` / `dev-flow` 只把闭环写到 `Build -> Smoke`，没有把 `install:global -> managed restart -> exact sample replay -> full gate` 设成默认 mandatory path。
- `goal-prompt` 只要求“验证类别”，不强制写每次修复都要的 build/install/replay 顺序。
- `install:global` 脚本默认做 build + install + restart + version check，但不强制 replay 旧错误样本；因此它本身给 agent 提供了一个“看起来已经闭环”的终点。
- `docs/agent-routing/20-build-test-release-routing.md` 把最小栈写成 build/install/restart/health，容易让 agent 把 health 误判为完成。
- `dev-flow` 和 `feature-dev` 都强调 red/green/build/smoke，但没有把“全局安装后回放原始样本”提升为不可跳过的默认门禁；因此 agent 默认会停在低成本验证。

# 2026-06-30 4444 SSE stream disconnected before completion

- 现象：4444 用户样本持续报 `stream disconnected before completion: stream closed before response.completed`，截图里是 `llama-cli --help | rg ...` 触发的 SSE 读流错误。
- 当前排查目标：对照 `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-responses/ports/4444/` 最新样本与 `~/.rcc/logs/server-4444.log`，确认终止事件是在 upstream、provider-response 投影、还是 server SSE 转发层丢失。
- 先验约束：不允许用 synthetic `response.completed` 兜底；如果 upstream 真没终止帧，必须走显式错误，不可静默补成功。
- 根因证据：样本 `req_1782784441654_rqsa7tvzd/provider-response_1.json` 的 upstream/bodyText 已包含 `event: response.completed`；因此不是 upstream 无终止帧。风险点在 server SSE transport 用单 chunk `includes('event: response.completed')` 判定终态，真实 SSE chunk 可任意切分，可能把完整终态误判为 close-before-terminal。
- 修复：`src/server/handlers/handler-response-sse.ts` 新增跨 chunk 滑动窗口终态识别，支持 `event: response.completed/response.done/response.error` 与 `data.type=response.completed/response.done/response.error`；不生成 synthetic terminal，不改写 payload。
- 回归：`tests/server/handlers/handler-response-utils.sse-finish-reason.spec.ts` 增加 split chunk terminal case；focused test PASS。整份 spec 仍有既有 5 个红点，集中在 `[DONE]`/required_action 旧期望，不是本修复新增。
- 验证：root `tsc --noEmit` PASS；sharedmodule `tsc` PASS；`npm run build:base` PASS；`npm run install:global` 后 `routecodex --version=0.90.3319` 且全局 dist 含 `hasResponsesTerminalSseMarker/terminalScanBuffer`；`routecodex restart --port 4444` 后 `/health` ready。
- 在线 4444 probe：`curl -N http://127.0.0.1:4444/v1/responses` 样本返回 `response.completed`，无 `upstream_stream_incomplete/event:error`；client snapshot `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-responses/ports/4444/req_1782785260032_b26b5d0e/client-response.json` 与 provider snapshot `req_1782785260045_clf87vcb8/provider-response_1.json` 均包含同一个 `resp_0c641a...` 的 `response.completed`。
- 额外验证：`npm run verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；`npm run verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS；scoped `git diff --check` PASS。

# 2026-06-30 VR online diagnostics design
- 用户要求先设计不实现：为 Virtual Router 增加在线查询与 dry-run 命中测试，用于按端口/route 诊查。
- 证据：Rust `VirtualRouterEngineCore::get_status()` 目前只输出粗略 `routes/health/forwarders`；真实 route/filter/default floor/unavailable blockers 在 Rust `selection.rs`；HTTP 已有 local-only `/_routecodex/diagnostics/virtual-router` 但只是薄 status 壳。
- 已新增设计文档：`docs/goals/virtual-router-online-diagnostics-plan.md`。
- 设计结论：Rust VR 为唯一语义真源；TS 仅做 HTTP/CLI 薄壳；dry-run 必须 strictly read-only，不推进 load-balancer/health/routing-state/sticky/cooldown/provider stats；诊断输出必须解释 `PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE` 的 provider_disabled/health_cooldown/concurrency/forwarder/context/default_pool 等原因。

# 2026-06-30 VR protocol boundary cleanup
- 用户明确规则：Virtual Router 不得按入口/目标协议过滤或重排目标；VR 只在当前端口 route group 内按 route pool/default pool/availability/capability 选择目标；命中后由 server 比较 inbound protocol 与 target outbound profile 决定 direct 或 relay。
- 本轮清理：
  - 删除 `selection.rs` 中 router-direct inbound protocol 对 forced/prefer/route pool/default floor/forwarder target 的过滤。
  - 删除 direct_model 中 `routerDirectInboundProtocol/providerProtocol` 对 provider.model 候选的过滤；显式 `provider.model` 跨协议也先命中目标，协议差异留给 server direct/relay 边界。
  - 删除 `ProviderRegistry::provider_protocol_matches` 及其自测，避免 VR 内继续存在“协议匹配即目标过滤”的 helper。
  - `read_provider_protocol_lock` 改为 metadata 内部 `read_provider_protocol_for_routing_state`，不再从 routing 公共 API 导出，避免被误用为 target lock。
  - 测试文件从 `virtual-router-router-direct-protocol-filter.spec.ts` 改名为 `virtual-router-router-direct-protocol-boundary.spec.ts`。
- 验证：
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi router_direct --lib -- --nocapture` PASS，5/5。
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi provider_protocol_metadata --lib -- --nocapture` PASS，2/2。
  - `npx jest --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/virtual-router-router-direct-protocol-boundary.spec.ts --runInBand` PASS，3/3。
  - `npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` PASS。
  - `node sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/build-native-hotpath.mjs` PASS。
  - 源码残留扫描 `rg 'provider_protocol_lock|protocol-filter|filter_router_direct_protocol|filter_provider_protocol_lock|router_direct_direct_model_rejects_cross_protocol_target|provider_protocol_lock_skips_incompatible' sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/crates/router-hotpath-napi/src/virtual_router_engine tests/sharedmodule -g '*.rs' -g '*.ts'` 0 命中。
- 未闭环：`npm run build:base` 当前被既有架构文档 gate 阻塞：`docs/architecture/wiki/mainline-call-graph.md` 缺 `vr.online_diagnostics.mainline` section。该阻塞在本轮 VR protocol focused gate 之后暴露，尚未处理。

# 2026-06-30 4444 SSE large terminal frame false client_close 修复闭环

- 根因：线上 4444 样本 `req_1782792812769_3be0ff10` / `req_1782792836612_06b2bcd6` 的 `client-response.json` 已含 `response.completed`，但 `client-response.error.json` 仍记录 `client_close_before_terminal`。原因是 `handler-response-sse.ts` 先把 terminal scan buffer 截到最后 512 字符再扫描；真实 `response.completed` data 很大，marker 在 chunk 开头，被截断后误判 `sawTerminalEvent=false`。
- 修复：`src/server/handlers/handler-response-sse.ts` 改为先扫描完整 `terminalScanWindow = previousBuffer + currentChunk`，再截短保存后续跨 chunk buffer；不合成 terminal，不改写 SSE payload，只修正 transport closeout 观测。
- 红测：新增 `does not miss response.completed when terminal frame body is larger than scan buffer`，复刻大 terminal frame 后 close 的线上形态；修复前红，修复后绿。
- 验证：
  - `node --experimental-vm-modules ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js tests/server/handlers/handler-response-utils.sse-finish-reason.spec.ts --runInBand --testNamePattern 'larger than scan buffer|spaced data.type|chunk boundaries|event: message'` PASS。
  - `npm run verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS。
  - `npm run verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS。
  - `npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` PASS。
  - `npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS。
  - `npm run build:base` PASS。
  - `npm run install:global` PASS，global version `0.90.3327`。
  - `routecodex restart --port 4444` 后 `/health` 返回 `version: 0.90.3327`。
  - 线上 4444 长 terminal probe：`req_1782793660279_a2a9f095/client-response.json` 长度 43728，含 `response.completed`，无 `event:error` / `upstream_stream_incomplete` / `client_close_before_terminal`，且无 `client-response.error.json`。
  - 重启后日志检查：`RouteCodex version: 0.90.3327` 之后无新的 `response.sse.client_close`。
- 剩余无关红：整份 `tests/server/handlers/handler-response-utils.sse-finish-reason.spec.ts --runInBand` 仍有 5 个既有旧语义用例失败，集中在 `[DONE]`/required_action repair 旧期望；本轮 focused regression 与架构 gate 已闭环。

# 2026-06-30 4444 context / usage flow audit

- 现象：4444 最新慢请求已不再主要是 SSE terminal 丢失；provider request 已命中 `gpt-5.4-mini`，但 provider input 持续膨胀。
- 样本证据：`~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-responses/ports/4444/req_1782794286846_96h6frka4/provider-request.json` 的 provider body 为 `model=gpt-5.4-mini`、`store=false`、无 `previous_response_id`、`input.length=269`、`tools.length=18`、body 约 770KB；同轮 completed usage 为 `input_tokens=163327`、`cached_tokens=161792`、`output_tokens=816`。
- 直接原因：provider input 中已有大量历史工具输出，样本 `req_1782794315119_gh7z4d8bu` 有 104 个 `function_call_output`、约 475K 字符；这不是 delta 请求，而是 full history 重发。
- 流程缺口：`responses-conversation-store.json` 为空；`buildRouterDirectResult()` 对 openai-responses streaming direct 在 `normalized.sseStream !== undefined` 时清理 responses continuation；因此 streaming direct response 的 `response.completed` / usage / responseId 没有写入 continuation store。
- 估算缺口：VR `features.rs` 只在 metadata 有 `estimatedInputTokens` / `estimatedTokens` 时用客户端估算；否则 fallback 为 full request structured estimate，包含 `input` / `tools` / `semantics`，不是 usage-delta 估算。
- 结论：当前 4444 主线没有闭合“请求估算 -> 响应 usage -> 下一轮 delta”的设计；实际闭合是 full payload fallback + context spillover 路由。cached tokens 可降低实际新增处理/计费，但不能当作 provider context window 的唯一判断依据。

# 2026-06-30 snapshot entryPort missing closed

- 已确认 live 重放样本 `req_1782794745252_cc6aywtq5/runs/sample_1782796307118/snapshot-entryport-20260630` 返回 200，SSE 产物含 `response.completed`，未再命中 `entryPort missing` / `entryPort required` / `client_close_before_terminal`。
- 收口结果：`src/debug/snapshot/provider-writer.ts`、`src/providers/core/runtime/http-request-executor.ts`、`src/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.ts`、`src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts`、`src/server/runtime/http-server/router-direct-failure-snapshot.ts`、`sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/snapshot-recorder.ts` 均改为只从显式 `entryPort` 或 `MetadataCenter.requestTruth.portScope` 取端口；删掉 flat metadata / `__rt` / port context 回退。
- 新门禁：`request-executor.metadata-center.contract.spec.ts` 现在锁住 `requestTruth.portScope` 为唯一端口真源，并增加 flat metadata 端口字段在 `requestTruth.portScope` 缺失时必须失效的反向测试。
- 验证：`jest` 相关 2 个 suite PASS，`npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` PASS，`git diff --check` PASS，源码扫描未再命中目标路径里的旧端口回退。
- 约束：本轮按用户要求未重启服务器，仅做了在线健康/重放与只读检查。
# 2026-06-30: stats data plane audit for webui
- 现状：stats 数据面分三路，`StatsManager` 管 provider 历史/periods，`token-stats-store` 管 token alltime+daily+per-provider，`usage-logger` 还有本地日切的临时调用数；`StatsPage` 只消费 `/daemon/stats`，未直接消费 `tokenStats`。
- 关键不一致：token 侧 `getTodayKey()` / `resolveLocalDayKey()` 是本地日期，`StatsManager.mergeSnapshotIntoPeriods()` 仍用 `toUtcDayKey()`，所以 call count 日界与 token 日界现在不一致。
- 额外碎片：`recordUsageRollup()` 仍会读 `getTokenStatsSnapshot()` 做 rollup 打印，`src/tools/stats-request-events.ts` / `src/tools/stats-usage.ts` 也是独立 request-events 统计面，当前无 runtime 唯一 owner。
- 结论：数据面必须先收口成单一 stats owner 和单一汇总链，再做 UI，避免重复覆盖、重复 merge、口径漂移。

# 2026-06-30 4444 disconnect: context vs SSE audit
- 目标：判断 Codex UI `Stream disconnected before completion: Transport error: network error: error decoding response body` 是上下文/continuation 问题还是 SSE 传输问题。
- 当前 runtime：tmux `rccserver` 中全端口健康，4444/5520/5555/10000 `/health` 均 ready，version `0.90.3331`。
- SSE 证据：当前版本 live 4444 最小 `/v1/responses` streaming curl 返回 `response.completed`，`curl_exit=0`，无 `event: error`；0.90.3331 之后的 4444/5520 日志段中 `response.sse.client_close`、`upstream_stream_incomplete`、`OpenAI Responses SSE response did not contain response payload` 均为 0。
- 上下文证据：`~/.rcc/state/responses-conversation-store.json` 为 `{"version":1,"entries":[]}`；真实 Codex 样本 provider request 仍是 `store=false`、无 `previous_response_id`、full-history input（如 4444 样本 `input=228/toolOutputs=18/286KB`，5520 样本可到 `input=469/toolOutputs=140/~1MB`）。
- 代码证据：`src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts` 的两个 direct result builder 在 `normalized.sseStream !== undefined` 时调用 `clearResponsesConversationByRequestId(input.requestId)`，导致 openai-responses direct streaming 成功完成也不会记录 continuation/usage。
- 结论：当前主因不是基础 SSE terminal；是 direct streaming responses 的 continuation/usage 闭环缺失，造成下一轮不能用 responseId/usage/delta，只能 full-history 重发并持续触发 longcontext。
- 修正：direct stream 不应成为 continuation/usage 语义 owner；`store` 空和 usage `n/a` 只能证明 direct passthrough 没做语义记录，不能单独判定为 direct stream bug。direct stream 验收口径应收窄为协议/中转合规：headers、SSE frame JSON、terminal/error event、close/timeout 行为。
- 协议合规复测：4444 live `/v1/responses` streaming 返回 `HTTP 200`、`Content-Type: text/event-stream; charset=utf-8`、`Cache-Control: no-cache, no-transform`、`Transfer-Encoding: chunked`；12 个 SSE block 中 11 个 data JSON 可解析，事件尾部包含 `response.completed`，无 bad lines、无 error event、无 `__metadataCenter` 泄漏。
- 追加黑盒复测：临时 `/tmp/rcc_reqwest_probe` 用 reqwest body decoder 直连 5520/gpt-5.4 与 4444/gpt-5.5，最小、长输入（25000 repeat）、并发 10 条均 `status=200`、body 完整读完、含 `response.completed`、无 decode error。
- 追加真实 Codex 客户端复测：`codex exec -p rcm -m gpt-5.4 ... --json --ephemeral` 与 `codex exec -p gcm -m gpt-5.5 ... --json --ephemeral` 最小 prompt 均 `turn.completed`；shell tool 单轮与三命令多工具样本也均 `turn.completed`。
- 当前结论修正：`curl/reqwest/Codex exec` 的最小、长输入、并发、工具闭环都未复现 UI `error decoding response body`，所以不能继续泛化修 SSE；下一步必须抓 exact failing UI request（端口、requestId、client close/error、client-visible last frame）或构造更接近 UI 的长会话样本。

# 2026-06-30 Responses SSE error projection Rust closeout
- 本轮继续 SSE Rust 化收口：`projectSseErrorEventPayload` 从 `src/server/utils/http-error-mapper.ts` 本地拼装改为经 `src/modules/llmswitch/bridge/native-exports.ts::projectSseErrorEventPayloadNative` 调 Rust NAPI `projectSseErrorEventPayloadJson`。
- Rust 真源落点：`sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/crates/router-hotpath-napi/src/hub_resp_outbound_client_semantics_blocks/client_tool_args.rs::project_sse_error_event_payload`；NAPI 绑定在 `napi_bindings.rs`；required export 已加 `projectSseErrorEventPayloadJson`。
- 补测：`tests/server/utils/http-error-mapper-native-projection.spec.ts` 锁住 `http-error-mapper` 必须委托 native facade；Rust 单测覆盖 request_id 缺失使用本地 requestId、显式 upstream request_id 保留。
- 关键踩坑：Jest 会加载 checked-in `src/modules/llmswitch/bridge/*.js` 镜像；只删 TS surface 不够，旧 `responses-response-bridge.js` / `responses-sse-bridge.js` 会复活已删除的 JSON->SSE fallback 与 bridge-owned SSE error helper。已同步删除 JS/DTS 镜像旧导出和旧实现。
- 验证：`cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi project_sse_error_event_payload --lib -- --nocapture` PASS；`node sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/build-native-hotpath.mjs` PASS；root/sharedmodule typecheck PASS；focused Jest 5 suites 25 tests PASS；`verify:responses-sse-business-module`、`verify:responses-handler-single-bridge-surface`、`verify:sse-architecture-boundary`、`verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS；bridge old symbol residue scan 0 命中；`git diff --check` PASS。
- 未做：按用户“不重启服务器”的约束，本轮未 install/restart/live replay。
# 2026-06-30: responses-event-serializer static synthesis helpers removed

- 本 slice 从 `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/shared/serializers/responses-event-serializer.ts` 物理删除 `createResponseCreatedEvent` / `createResponseInProgressEvent` / `createResponseCompletedEvent` / `createRequiredActionEvent` / `createResponseDoneEvent` / `createResponseErrorEvent`，去掉 TS 层用 `timestamp ?? Date.now()` 合成 Responses SSE 事件的 dead residue。
- 门禁同步：`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` 现在显式禁止上述 static factory marker 和 `timestamp: timestamp ?? Date.now()` 回退复活；`tests/sharedmodule/responses-event-serializer-no-salvage.spec.ts` 改为断言这些静态工厂在运行时不存在。
- 验证：focused Jest `responses-event-serializer-no-salvage` PASS；`npm run verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；`npm run verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS；`npx tsc -p sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` PASS；root `tsc --noEmit` PASS；`git diff --check` PASS。

# 2026-06-30 direct completed response missing_request_context fix

- 现象：4444/5520 `/v1/responses` direct non-stream completed 响应可能被本地 Responses conversation store 当作 continuation response 写入，若本轮没有 request capture，则 `recordResponse` 抛 `MALFORMED_RESPONSE missing_request_context`。
- 修复：`RouteCodexHttpServer.persistOrClearResponsesDirectContinuation` 改为只有 `isToolCallContinuationResponseNative(responseBody)` 为真时才 `recordResponsesResponseForRequest`；普通 completed/error-like 非 continuation 响应只清理同 requestId 的 stale local capture，不写本地 continuation store。
- 验证：新增 router-direct/provider-direct completed-without-capture regression，focused jest `-t "completed response without captured request context"` PASS；`npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` PASS；`npm run build:base` PASS；`npm run install:global` PASS；`routecodex restart --port 4444` 后 `/health` 版本 `0.90.3333`。
- 在线验证：4444 non-stream `/v1/responses` 返回 HTTP 200 completed `direct nonstream probe ok`；4444 stream 返回 HTTP 200 且含 `response.completed`；5520 non-stream 返回 HTTP 200 completed `5520 direct nonstream probe ok`；验证窗口未新增 `missing_request_context`。
# 2026-06-30: chat SSE usage normalization moved to Rust/native owner

- 本 slice 将 `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/sse-to-json/chat-sse-to-json-converter.ts` 里的本地 `normalizeChatUsage` / `readNonNegativeInteger` 删除，改为走 Rust `normalize_chat_usage` + NAPI `normalizeChatUsageJson` + TS wrapper `normalizeChatUsageWithNative`。
- Rust 真源允许 `input_tokens_details: null` / `prompt_tokens_details: null` 作为“无 cached_tokens”合法形状，但仍对非对象且非 null 的嵌套 usage 细项 fail-fast。
- 门禁同步：`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` 禁止 `chat-sse-to-json-converter.ts` 复活本地 usage normalizer 和旧调用 marker；`chat-sse-no-salvage.spec.ts` 新增正向用例锁 native owner 输出 `prompt_tokens/completion_tokens/total_tokens/prompt_tokens_details.cached_tokens`。
- 验证：Rust focused `normalize_chat_usage` PASS；`build-native-hotpath` PASS；`chat-sse-no-salvage.spec.ts` PASS；`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；`verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS；sharedmodule `tsc --noEmit` PASS；`git diff --check` PASS。
- 真实样本追加证据：同一条 `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-chat/ports/10000/req_1782778465399_hrxbpl3tz/provider-response_1.json` replay 不再报 usage null shape 错，但继续暴露独立残留 `Invalid chat completion chunk id`（尾部空 chunk 校验问题），应作为下一 slice 单独收口，不能算本次 usage owner 回退。
# 2026-06-30: chat SSE inert tail chunk validator tightened to real-sample boundary

- 真实样本 `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-chat/ports/10000/req_1782778465399_hrxbpl3tz/provider-response_1.json` 在 usage native-owner 修复后继续暴露独立问题：尾部 `choices: []` / 空 `id|object|created` chunk 会被 `chat-sse-to-json-converter.ts::validateChatChunk` 当成坏首块误判，报 `Invalid chat completion chunk id`。
- 本 slice 将 validator 改成“首个语义块必须完整，但已建立 `currentResponse.id/created/model` 后允许 inert tail / usage-only tail chunk 继续通过”；不做 salvage，不允许前置空 id chunk 借此过关。
- focused test 同时锁两面：允许 valid chunk 之后的 empty tail / usage-only tail chunk；仍然拒绝首块空 id。
- 验证：`chat-sse-no-salvage.spec.ts` PASS；`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit` PASS；`git diff --check` PASS；真实样本 replay 结果：`id=487e5ebc-ef2c-49d6-a81a-ce555c424a69`、`model=glm-5.2`、`finish_reason=tool_calls`、`tool_calls=1`、`usage={prompt_tokens:262815,completion_tokens:38,total_tokens:262846}`。
# 2026-06-30: servertool response-stage prepass single-return slice

- `response-stage-prepass-shell.ts` 里的两处 `continue_to_execution` 重复返回已收敛为单个 `continueToExecution` 常量复用，TS 只保留一份返回壳。
- `servertool-active-orchestration-audit.spec.ts` 已同步改成锁单点常量和单点返回，不再依赖重复对象字面量形态。
- 语义不变：`responseHookMatched !== true` 与 auto-hook 未返回结果时仍走同一条 continue 路径，Rust 继续是真源。
- 待确认：`verify:function-map-compile-gate`、`verify:architecture-mainline-call-map`、`verify:servertool-rust-only`、`git diff --check`。
# 2026-06-30: 4444 frequent UPSTREAM_STREAM_INCOMPLETE triage
- 18:34 现场：`openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260630T183414229-430249-3559` 走 4444 `search/gateway-glm-4444-priority-search -> ykk.gpt-5.3-codex-spark`，随后 `UPSTREAM_STREAM_INCOMPLETE stream closed before response.completed`。
- 不是 search route 缺 fallback：live VR status 显示 `gateway_glm_4444:search` 配置/可用目标为 `ykk.ykk.gpt-5.3-codex-spark` + `minimax.key1.MiniMax-M3`。
- 根因方向：Rust VR `route()` 只从 `metadataCenterSnapshot.excludedProviderKeys` 读取 retry exclusion；旧 live 运行体没有把顶层 `metadata.excludedProviderKeys` 投进 `metadataCenterSnapshot`，所以 provider-switch 后仍可能重选 ykk。
- 当前源码证据：`src/server/runtime/http-server/index.ts::buildMetadataCenterSnapshot` 已把 `metadata.excludedProviderKeys` 过滤后写入 snapshot；`tests/server/runtime/http-server/direct-passthrough-route-level.spec.ts` 已有断言第二次 route metadata 同时包含顶层和 snapshot exclusion。
- 验证：focused `direct-decision.upstream-stream-incomplete + retry-execution-plan` 14 passed；root `tsc --noEmit` passed。未重启服务器；live 4444 仍需在构建/安装/受管重启后用同类 search 样本验证。

# 2026-06-30: request-executor priority backoff wait assertion timing
- Verified via a minimal repro that `server.global_error_backoff_wait` does fire and the same priority provider is retried after the 1s backoff; the failing Jest was checking the log too early under fake timers.
- Fix applied: `tests/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.spec.ts` now advances fake timers by `0ms` after starting the second request before asserting the wait-stage log.
- Verification: the targeted `request-executor.spec.ts` backoff case now passes.

# 2026-06-30: provider-request body snapshot disabled
- Root cause: old debug snapshot design copied provider outbound body as `provider-request.json`, which can preserve/expand internal control carriers such as `__metadataCenter` and violates data/control split.
- Fix: removed live send-path provider-request snapshot calls, deleted router-direct request snapshot API, made TS writer and Rust hub snapshot hook hard-reject exact `provider-request`, kept `provider-request-contract` for non-body shape observation.
- Verification: `verify:architecture-snapshot-stage-contract`, focused snapshot Jest, `http-request-executor.snapshot-entry-port`, Rust `provider_request_body_snapshot_is_disabled`, `build-native-hotpath`, `build:base`, global install `0.90.3340`, `/health` on 5555/4444, global writer hard-reject check.

# 2026-07-01: 5555 relay JSON 200->502 no-tools request context root cause
- Live evidence: `/Volumes/extension/.rcc/logs/server-4444.log:81151-81155` for request `openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260701T160328255-440680-1717` now shows 5555 non-stream `/v1/responses` -> orangeai glm-5.2, provider completed `status=200 finish_reason=tool_calls`, then usage logged; no following `failed: Upstream provider error`.
- Root cause for the previous same-shape failure: relay `/v1/responses` with no tools could build `ResponsesRequestContextForHttp.context.toolsRaw = undefined`, while response client projection explicitly requires `requestContext.context.toolsRaw` to be an array. The throw happened after provider success in `sendPipelineResponse` JSON dispatch, so logs looked like provider 200 then handler 502.
- Fix: `src/modules/llmswitch/bridge/responses-request-bridge.ts` and checked-in JS now always set captured relay `toolsRaw` to `[]` when native capture has no tools; `payload.tools` is still omitted when empty, so provider/client payload semantics are not inflated.
- Verification: red test `keeps relay request context toolsRaw as an empty array when no tools are captured` first failed with `Received: undefined`, then passed; response bridge projection tests passed; `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed; `npm run build:base` passed; global dist `0.90.3448` contains the `toolsRaw: []` code; 5555 health OK; live same-entry minimal request returned HTTP 200 and log showed no post-200 failure.

# 2026-07-01: direct JSON StringExpected root cause locked and fixed
- 根因锁定：4444 非流 `/v1/responses` 单轮 direct 请求在 provider 200 后本地抛 `StringExpected`；live red `openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260701T063346584-436298-9608` 证明无 continuation/history 也复现，非旧上下文问题。
- 唯一错误层：`sendPipelineResponse -> prepareResponsesJsonClientDispatchPlanForHttp` 对 `continuationOwner=direct` 的 JSON response 仍进入 Responses client projection；direct 路径没有 projection 所需 `requestContext.context.toolsRaw`，违反 direct passthrough + hooks 合同。
- 修复：`prepareResponsesJsonClientDispatchPlanForHttp` 对 `continuationOwner === 'direct'` 直接返回原 body，不进入 Responses projection；handler JSON dispatch 显式传入 `result.continuationOwner`。
- 验证：bridge 定向 Jest 5 passed；root tsc PASS；`verify:responses-handler-single-bridge-surface` PASS；`verify:responses-direct-tool-shape-contract` PASS；`build:base` PASS；全局安装 0.90.3382；4444 health OK；live red 非流请求由 HTTP 502/StringExpected 变 HTTP 200；spark streaming shape 样本路由到 `ykk.gpt-5.3-codex-spark` 且 HTTP 200。
2026-07-01: 4444 ykk latest audit: request openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260701T064817024-436348-9658 hit ykk.gpt-5.4-mini first and got provider.send HTTP_502, then rerouted through asxs/XL and finally failed on 1token with UPSTREAM_STREAM_TIMEOUT. Same 4444 thinking ykk minimal JSON and SSE probes returned HTTP 200, so ykk is not globally unavailable; root body for the original 502 was not captured because router-direct snapshot entryPort was read back from MetadataCenter and became undefined. Fixed direct snapshot entryPort to use portConfig.port; installed/restarted 4444; no new entryPort missing after restart.
# 2026-07-01: servertool CLI projection runtime shell deleted
- `cli-projection-runtime-shell.ts` and its focused spec were physically deleted; `execution-stage-shell.ts` now calls `buildServertoolCliProjectionRuntimeBranchWithNative()` directly and passes native dispatch executable calls through to Rust branch planning without local `{id,name,executionMode}` rebuilding.
- Rust/NAPI `build_servertool_cli_projection_runtime_branch_json()` now receives `projectedToolCallId + base`, collects additional client tool calls in Rust, and constructs the client-visible projection branch.
- Function/verification maps, servertool ownership/followup/stopless wiki md+html, design docs, and `verify-servertool-rust-only` now point to `execution-stage-shell.spec.ts` and deleted-file guards.

# 2026-07-01: Responses SSE encode validation-disable bypass removed
- Red evidence: `tests/sharedmodule/responses-sse-usage-no-fallback.spec.ts` first failed because `sequenceResponse(..., { enableValidation:false })` silently skipped an unknown `output` item and still emitted `response.completed` / `response.done`.
- Fix: `responses-sequencer.ts` no longer exposes or checks `enableValidation`; response shape validation, output-item type validation, and content-part max checks always fail-fast. `responses-json-to-sse-converter.ts` no longer passes conversion config into a validation-disable switch.
- Gate: `verify-sse-architecture-boundary.mjs` now forbids the old `enableValidation` bypass markers in the Responses sequencer.
- Verification: focused Responses SSE Jest 37/37 PASS; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS; `verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS; sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit` PASS; `git diff --check` PASS. `build:base` is currently blocked before build by existing `docs/architecture/wiki/servertool-ownership-map.md is out of sync`; no server restart/live replay was performed in this slice.
# 2026-07-01: Responses JSON->SSE converter context cache removed
- Red evidence: `responses-json-to-sse-context-no-dead-state.spec.ts` first failed because `responses-json-to-sse-converter.ts` still contained `CONTEXT_TTL_MS`, `MAX_CONTEXTS`, `pruneResponsesContexts`, converter-level `contexts` map, and `getContext/getActiveContexts/clearContext`.
- Fix: `ResponsesJsonToSseConverterRefactored` now only creates a local per-stream context; removed converter-level map, TTL/max-size pruning, active-context APIs, and dead context fields `responsesResponse/currentResponse/isStreaming`.
- Gate: `verify-sse-architecture-boundary.mjs` forbids the old context cache/API markers.

# 2026-07-01: Responses JSON->SSE converter config defaults removed
- Red evidence: `responses-json-to-sse-context-no-dead-state.spec.ts` first failed because `responses-json-to-sse-converter.ts` still imported `DEFAULT_RESPONSES_CONVERSION_CONFIG`, exposed constructor config, returned `getConfig`, and used `context.options.chunkSize || this.config.defaultChunkSize` / `delayMs || defaultDelayMs`.
- Fix: converter no longer owns config defaults or `getConfig`; it only forwards explicit `chunkSize` / `delayMs` when present. Missing chunk config falls through to sequencer/native defaults instead of a converter-level second truth.
- Gate: `verify-sse-architecture-boundary.mjs` forbids converter config/falsy fallback markers.

2026-07-01 direct path audit:
- Fixed router-direct failure observability: forced provider snapshots now bypass snapshot stage selector when `forceLocalDiskWriteWhenDisabled=true`, and direct send opens the local snapshot gate for the active requestId.
- Router-direct failure snapshots now include diagnostic-only `providerRequestShape` (keys/model/stream/reasoning/input/tool counts/text chars) and observed fields, not the full provider payload.
- Live 4444 validation on version 0.90.3383 captured `openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260701T071448432-436460-9770`: ykk and asxs both failed HTTP 502 with identical shape, `model=gpt-5.4-mini`, `stream=true`, `hasMetadata=false`, `input.count=617`, `tools.count=12`, `reasoning.summary=detailed`. No internal body metadata leak was observed in the captured shape.
- Rebuilt/installed/restarted 4444 to 0.90.3384 after adding `estimatedTextChars` for future direct failure snapshots; `/health` returned version 0.90.3384.
# 2026-07-01: servertool auto-hook queue order moved to native plan
- `plan_servertool_auto_hook_queues_json()` now emits `queueOrder[]` with Rust-owned queue labels and entries; TS parser preserves this native queue order instead of reconstructing `A_optional/B_mandatory` locally.
- `auto-hook-caller.ts` consumes `nativePlan.queueOrder` and no longer builds a local queue-order array; `verify-servertool-rust-only.mjs` forbids local queue name hardcoding in the caller.

# 2026-07-01: servertool response-stage required hook action moved to Rust
- `response_stage_runtime_action_contract.rs` now derives `return_required_response_hook_empty` and `responseHookName` from `responseStageGatePlan`; TS `response-stage-auto-hook-shell.ts` no longer reads `responseHookRequired` or builds `responseHookName ?? 'unknown'`.
- `native-servertool-core-semantics.ts` returns `responseHookName` from the Rust action plan; `verify-servertool-rust-only.mjs` now forbids the old TS required-hook derivation markers.
- Verification: `cargo test -p servertool-core response_stage_runtime_action` PASS 7/7; NAPI bridge test `plans_servertool_response_stage_runtime_action_via_servertool_core_bridge` PASS; focused Jest `response-stage-auto-hook-shell + server-side-tools.failfast + servertool-active-orchestration-audit` PASS 49/49; `tsc` PASS; `build-native-hotpath` PASS; `verify:servertool-rust-only` PASS; `verify:architecture-mainline-call-map` PASS; scoped `rustfmt --check` PASS; `git diff --check` PASS. `verify:function-map-compile-gate` remains blocked by unrelated dirty SSE bridge/function-map work.

# 2026-07-01: stopless two-sided blackbox evidence audit
- User correction: previous stopless closure answer was too high-level; required evidence is client request/response and provider request/response blackbox observation, not only unit/blackbox PASS.
- Evidence run: temporary instrumented copy of `scripts/tests/stopless-contract-blackbox.mjs` printed `[stopless-evidence]` for `no_schema`, `invalid_schema`, and `next_step`; command exited `STATUS=0` and temp file was removed.
- Observed contract for all three cases: client first response has `exec_command` containing `routecodex hook run reasoningStop`, does not leak raw `"reasoningStop"`, and exposes required action/tool-call surface; provider first request contains `<rcc_stop_schema>`, conditional-required guidance, `reasoningStop` tool, and `reasoningStop.required=["stopreason"]`.
- Observed invalid-schema feedback: `invalid_schema` produced `schemaFeedbackReasonCode="stop_schema_next_step_missing"` and `missingFields=["next_step"]`; provider second request includes expected feedback text `stop_schema_next_step_missing`.
- Observed CoI/internal-tool conversion boundary: second provider request restores CLI result as internal `reasoningStop` `function_call` + matching `function_call_output`, with `restoredOutputTriggerHint` matching the case and no raw `stop_message_auto` CLI payload leak.

- Red evidence: `responses-sse-decode-no-ts-wire-synthesis` first failed because `ResponsesSseToJsonConverter.convertSseToJson(bodyText)` without debug options crashed on `options.requestId`; the same issue blocked real 4444 provider-response replay.

# 2026-07-01: 4444 direct 502 request-shape investigation
- Current evidence: 4444 failed direct Responses samples (0.90.3387/3388) have providerRequestShape input object=2. These are not metadata leaks; shape roleCounts shows they are two role-bearing message-like input entries missing type.
- Direct path owner evidence: ResponsesProvider.processIncomingDirect uses buildPassthroughResponsesBody(request) and router-direct only applies model/thinking/capability hooks; it bypasses Rust Hub req_inbound normalization.
- Success comparison: 4444 earlier gpt-5.4-mini success and 5520 gpt-5.4-mini success have no object input items. 5520 success has larger JSON chars (~400K) than 4444 failed estimated text (~317K), so size alone is not proven root cause.
- Candidate unique fix: reuse Rust Responses input normalization/provider-wire contract at direct provider wire boundary, not TS ad-hoc sanitize and not MetadataCenter. Need red test proving untyped role/content message cannot reach direct provider send.

- 2026-07-01 chat SSE fail-fast slice
  - Current state: `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/json-to-sse/sequencers/chat-sequencer.ts` still wraps `sequenceChatResponse()` in a catch and yields `buildErrorEvent(...)`, so malformed chat JSON→SSE input becomes a synthetic SSE error frame instead of a hard failure.
  - Tests updated to expect stream rejection for invalid usage, finish_reason, legacy function_call args, missing function_call id, missing tool_call args, and missing delta role.
  - Required follow-up: add architecture gate markers for the chat sequencer catch/buildErrorEvent path, remove the catch/import, then run focused jest + verify:sse-architecture-boundary + build.

- 2026-07-01 Responses content_part.done partless TS synthesis removal
  - Red evidence: focused `responses-sse-content-part-descriptor-native` first failed because exported TS `buildContentPartDoneEvent()` accepted `undefined` content and generated a partless `response.content_part.done` instead of failing.
  - Fix: `buildContentPartDoneEvent()` now requires a concrete `ResponsesContent`, the native TS wrapper no longer accepts optional `contentPart`, and `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` forbids the old optional/ternary markers.
  - Verification: focused Jest PASS 5/5; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary`, `verify:responses-sse-business-module`, `verify:hub-response-provider-sse-materialization`, `verify:function-map-compile-gate`, sharedmodule/root `tsc`, `verify:servertool-rust-only`, servertool execution/audit Jest, `build:base BUILD_EXIT:0`, `git diff --check`, real 4444 Responses SSE decode->encode replay, and source output_text content_part.done replay PASS.

# 2026-07-01: servertool execution loop effect carrier moved off TS Error message extraction
- Red evidence: `execution-queue-shell.ts` still did `lastErr instanceof Error ? lastErr.message : lastErr`, so TS was deciding handler error truth before native effect planning.
- Fix: queue shell now passes raw `lastErr` to `planServertoolExecutionLoopEffectWithNative()`. Native bridge encodes `Error` as `{ message }` for JSON transport, and Rust `execution_loop_effect_contract.rs` owns string/number/bool/object.message normalization and `unknown` fallback.
- Verification: focused servertool Jest PASS 4/4; `npx tsc -p sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/tsconfig.json --pretty false` PASS; `npm run verify:servertool-rust-only` PASS.

# 2026-07-01: Anthropic/Gemini JSON->SSE converter context cache removed
- Boundary correction: SSE layer must stay wire/frame/codec-only and must not own business semantics, lifecycle decisions, recovery, or compatibility synthesis.
- Red evidence: `anthropic-gemini-json-to-sse-context-no-dead-state` and `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` first failed on Anthropic/Gemini converter-level context cache markers: `private contexts = new Map`, `this.contexts.set(`, and `this.contexts.delete(`.
- Fix: `AnthropicJsonToSseConverter` and `GeminiJsonToSseConverter` now keep only per-call local conversion context; dead converter-level context maps were physically removed.
- Required follow-up verification: focused Anthropic/Gemini Jest, SSE architecture boundary, sharedmodule/root TypeScript, response SSE business gate, function-map gate, real 4444 replay, build, and exact-file commit.

# 2026-07-01: Chat SSE converter config surface removed
- Boundary correction: Chat SSE converter surfaces are IO/codec shells; they must not own converter-level default config or expose config introspection as a second semantic truth.
- Red evidence: `chat-json-to-sse-context-no-dead-state` and `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` first failed on `DEFAULT_CHAT_CONVERSION_CONFIG`, converter `private config`, constructor config injection, `this.config`, `getConfig`, and public `ChatConversionConfig`.
- Fix: `ChatJsonToSseConverterRefactored` and `ChatSseToJsonConverter` now pass only explicit per-call options into sequencer/dispatcher; `ChatConversionConfig`, `DEFAULT_CHAT_CONVERSION_CONFIG`, and `ChatSseEventStream.getConfig()` were physically removed.
- Verification so far: focused Chat Jest PASS 36/36; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary`, `verify:responses-sse-business-module`, sharedmodule/root `tsc`, and `verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS. Source-import replay needs dist build first.

# 2026-07-01: Anthropic/Gemini SSE converter config surface removed
- Boundary correction: Anthropic/Gemini JSON->SSE converters are per-call IO/codec shells and must not hold converter-level default config or constructor config injection as a second semantic/config truth.
- Red evidence: `anthropic-gemini-json-to-sse-context-no-dead-state` and `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` first failed on converter `private config`, constructor config injection, `this.config.*`, and `DEFAULT_ANTHROPIC_CONVERSION_CONFIG` / `DEFAULT_GEMINI_CONVERSION_CONFIG`.
- Fix: `AnthropicJsonToSseConverter` and `GeminiJsonToSseConverter` now pass only explicit per-call options into their sequencers; converter-level default config storage and constructor config injection were physically removed.
- Verification: focused Anthropic/Gemini Jest PASS 23/23; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary`, `verify:responses-sse-business-module`, sharedmodule/root `tsc`, and `verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS; source-level smoke replay via `tsx` confirms Anthropic `message_start/message_stop` and Gemini `gemini.data/gemini.done` still encode correctly.

# 2026-07-01: servertool registry builtin canonicalName contract moved to native wrapper
- Slice: `registry-orchestration-shell.ts` no longer throws a local `return_builtin`/`canonicalName` contract error. `planServertoolRegistryLookupFromSkeletonWithNative()` now trims and validates `canonicalName`, and rejects `action=return_builtin` without a non-empty canonical name before the TS shell sees the plan.
- Gate: `verify-servertool-rust-only` now forbids `native registry lookup returned builtin without canonicalName` and `if (!actionPlan.canonicalName)` in `registry-orchestration-shell.ts`, and requires the thin-shell call `name: actionPlan.canonicalName as string`.
- Verification: focused Jest `registry-orchestration-shell + servertool-active-orchestration-audit` PASS 49/49; sharedmodule `tsc` PASS; `verify:servertool-rust-only`, `verify:function-map-compile-gate`, `verify:architecture-mainline-call-map`, `build:base BUILD_STATUS:0`, and `git diff --check` PASS.
- Commit scope note: unrelated dirty package/router-direct/SSE/VR/native-exports/build-info files remain excluded from this servertool slice.

# 2026-07-01: servertool registry auto-hook sourceIndex rematch removed from TS
- Slice: `registry-orchestration-shell.ts` no longer rehydrates native auto-hook descriptors by `descriptor.sourceIndex` inside TS. `planServertoolRegistryBuiltinAutoHookEntriesWithNative()` now consumes builtin hook metadata, rebinds the native descriptor plan to registration/execution at the native wrapper boundary, and fails fast there if `sourceIndex` cannot resolve.
- Gate: `verify-servertool-rust-only` and `servertool-active-orchestration-audit` now require `planServertoolRegistryBuiltinAutoHookEntriesWithNative({` and forbid `descriptor.sourceIndex` plus the old TS error `native registry auto-hook descriptor missing entry`.
- Verification: focused Jest `registry-orchestration-shell + servertool-active-orchestration-audit` PASS 50/50; sharedmodule `tsc` PASS; `verify:servertool-rust-only`, `verify:function-map-compile-gate`, `verify:architecture-mainline-call-map`, `build:base BUILD_STATUS:0`, and `git diff --check` PASS.
- Commit scope note: unrelated dirty SSE/router-direct/VR/package/native-exports/build-info files remain excluded from this servertool slice.

# 2026-07-01: servertool engine skipReason contract moved to native wrapper
- Slice: `engine-orchestration-shell.ts` no longer throws the local `native engine skip plan missing skipReason` contract error. `planServertoolEngineSkipWithNative()` now rejects skipped actions without a non-blank `skipReason`, and the TS orchestration shell only consumes `engineSkipPlan.skipReason as string`.
- Gate: `verify-servertool-rust-only` and `engine-observation-shell.spec.ts` now forbid the local skipReason throw and keep the no-TS-normalization checks for `engineSkipPlan.skipReason ?? 'no_execution'` and `engineSkipPlan.skipReason.trim()`.
- Verification: focused Jest `engine-observation-shell + servertool-active-orchestration-audit` PASS 51/51; sharedmodule `tsc` PASS; `verify:servertool-rust-only`, `verify:function-map-compile-gate`, `verify:architecture-mainline-call-map`, `build:base BUILD_STATUS:0`, and `git diff --check` PASS.
- Commit scope note: unrelated dirty SSE/router-direct/VR/package/native-exports/build-info files remain excluded from this servertool slice.

# 2026-07-01: servertool auto-hook queue sourceIndex rematch removed from TS
- Slice: `auto-hook-caller.ts` no longer rehydrates Rust-planned auto-hook queue entries via `args.hooks[entry.sourceIndex]` or throws the local invalid-sourceIndex error. `planServertoolAutoHookQueueItemsWithNative()` now consumes the Rust queue plan, rebinds entries to hook execution items at the native wrapper boundary, and fails fast there if `sourceIndex` is invalid.
- Gate: `verify-servertool-rust-only` and `servertool-active-orchestration-audit` now require `planServertoolAutoHookQueueItemsWithNative({` in `auto-hook-caller.ts` and forbid `planServertoolAutoHookQueuesWithNative({`, `args.hooks[entry.sourceIndex]`, and `native auto-hook queue returned invalid sourceIndex` from the TS caller.
- Verification: focused Jest `servertool-active-orchestration-audit + server-side-tools.auto-hook-config + server-side-tools.failfast + servertool-auto-hook-trace` PASS 59/59; sharedmodule `tsc` PASS; `verify:servertool-rust-only`, `verify:function-map-compile-gate`, `verify:architecture-mainline-call-map`, `build:base BUILD_STATUS:0`, and `git diff --check` PASS.
- Commit scope note: unrelated dirty package/router-direct/VR/native-exports/build-info files remain excluded from this servertool slice.

# 2026-07-01: servertool auto-hook TS no-disposition fallback removed
- Slice: `auto-hook-caller.ts` no longer throws the local `native auto-hook execution returned no materialized disposition` error. After the native attempt plan is validated, TS only returns on `returnResult` and otherwise continues the queue.
- Boundary: `planAutoHookRuntimeAttemptWithNative()` now rejects `rethrowError=true` when no input error was passed, so the native wrapper owns the input/disposition contract instead of the TS caller keeping an impossible-disposition fallback.
- Gate: `servertool-auto-hook-trace`, `servertool-active-orchestration-audit`, and `verify-servertool-rust-only` forbid the removed TS throw and require the native wrapper guard marker.
- Verification: focused Jest `servertool-auto-hook-trace + servertool-active-orchestration-audit` PASS 49/49; sharedmodule `tsc` PASS; `verify:servertool-rust-only`, `verify:function-map-compile-gate`, `verify:architecture-mainline-call-map`, and `git diff --check` PASS.

# 2026-07-01: Responses SSE sequencer factory facade removed
- Red evidence: `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` first failed after adding forbidden markers for `export function createResponsesSequencer(`, `getConfig(): ResponsesSequencerConfig`, and spread-built `finalConfig`, proving Responses JSON->SSE still exposed a TS sequencer factory/config introspection facade.
- Fix: `ResponsesJsonToSseConverterRefactored` now calls `sequenceResponse()` directly with `createDefaultResponsesContext()` and explicit config; `createResponsesSequencer()` / `getConfig()` were physically removed from `responses-sequencer.ts`.
- Test correction: `responses-sse-chunking-no-fallback` no longer mocks retired TS `StringUtils.chunkString`; it now proves native chunking is used and TS chunker is not called.
- Verification: focused Responses SSE Jest PASS 43/43; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS; `verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS; sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit --pretty false` PASS; `verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS; `build:base` completed through webui/assets/cli permission; `git diff --check` PASS.
- Replay: current 4444 provider-response snapshots under `/Volumes/extension/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-responses/ports/4444` and `~/.rcc/...` have no `bodyText`/`rawBody`/`sseText`, so wire replay is unavailable. Source replay via `npx tsx` with `entryPort=4444` emitted `response.output_text.delta`, `response.completed`, `response.done`, and native chunks `hello `/`world`.

# 2026-07-01: Responses SSE delay control removed from TS encode path
- Red evidence: `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` first failed after adding forbidden markers for `enableDelay: boolean`, `withDelay()`, and `setTimeout(...config.chunkDelayMs...)` in `responses-sequencer.ts`.
- Fix: Responses JSON->SSE no longer accepts or propagates `delayMs`/`chunkDelayMs`/`enableDelay`; `withDelay()` and output-item sleep were physically removed. SSE encode now emits immediately and leaves timing/backpressure to stream IO only.
- Verification: focused Responses SSE Jest PASS 44/44; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS; sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit --pretty false` PASS; `verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS; `git diff --check` PASS.
- Replay: 4444 provider-response snapshots still lack `bodyText`/`rawBody`/`sseText`, so wire replay is unavailable. Source replay via `npx tsx` with `entryPort=4444` emitted `response.output_text.delta`, `response.completed`, `response.done`, and native chunks `hello `/`world`.
# 2026-07-01: Responses SSE handler kept transport-only; incomplete synthesis removed
- Slice: `src/server/handlers/handler-response-sse.ts` no longer synthesizes `upstream_stream_incomplete` / `response.sse.stream.incomplete` when upstream Responses SSE ends before terminal completion; `responses-sse-bridge.ts/js/d.ts` drop the TS-exported terminal-state helper so the handler stays transport-only.
- Test contract: `responses-handler.sse-terminal-event.blackbox.spec.ts` now asserts the handler does not synthesize `response.done` or repair upstream `required_action`; `responses-sse-client-contract.blackbox.spec.ts` now asserts provider-specific events, keepalive frames, and early close remain passthrough/non-semantic.
- Gate: `scripts/architecture/verify-responses-handler-single-bridge-surface.mjs` forbids local terminal-state markers and incomplete synthesis markers from returning.
- Verification: `handler-response-sse-upstream-incomplete.regression.spec.ts` PASS 2/2; `responses-handler.sse-terminal-event.blackbox.spec.ts` PASS 4/4 with `--forceExit`; `responses-sse-client-contract.blackbox.spec.ts` PASS 9/9; `verify:responses-handler-single-bridge-surface`, `verify:responses-sse-business-module`, `verify:sse-architecture-boundary`, `verify:function-map-compile-gate`, sharedmodule/root `tsc`, `git diff --check`, and `build:base` PASS.
- Residual: terminal-event Jest still leaves open handles and needs `--forceExit`; unrelated dirty package/servertool/colored-logger files remain excluded.
